We provide experiments on 16 UCI datasets with outliers and on MNIST images with noise to show that the Gini MDS outperforms the Euclidean MDS on noisy data. Finally, a tensor-based implementation in \texttt{PyTorch} provides GPU acceleration and efficient computation compared to the standard MDS of the \texttt{sklearn} library.

</details>


### [588] [Blocked Gibbs meets Diffusion Transformers: Unsupervised Learning for Constraint Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25129)
*Yudong W. Xu,Wenhao Li,Xiaoyu Wang,Scott Sanner,Elias B. Khalil*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Blocked Gibbs Diffusion Transformer (BloGDiT)，通过引入分块高斯去噪替代标准联合高斯去噪，解决扩散模型在求解一般离散约束优化问题时因逐变量小步去噪导致的可行性/最优性难以达成的问题；在Sudoku、图着色、最大独立集和MaxCut等任务上达到或超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的约束优化方法受限于二值变量和图神经网络，难以扩展到具有一般离散变量或需全局推理的约束结构问题。

Method: 提出Blocked Gibbs Diffusion Transformer（BloGDiT），采用分块高斯去噪与迭代分块重采样，并随训练过程退火块大小，实现对变量子集的大范围、定向修改。

Result: 在Sudoku、Graph Coloring、Maximum Independent Set和MaxCut四个典型约束满足与优化任务上，BloGDiT匹配或优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 分块Gibbs式扩散为Transformer架构提供了强归纳偏置，显著提升了其在离散约束问题上的建模与求解能力。

Abstract: Diffusion models have shown promise in learning to solve constraint optimization problems. However, they are mostly restricted to problems with binary variables and rely on graph neural networks, hindering their application to a broader range of problems such as those with general discrete variables or constraint structures that necessitate global rather than local reasoning. We investigate the use of Diffusion Transformers to address the aforementioned limitations. A naive implementation performs poorly due to a fundamental mismatch between the standard diffusion process and constraint solving: while the former applies small, incremental denoising across all variables, the latter requires substantially altering specific subsets of variables to attain feasibility or optimality. Our method, Blocked Gibbs Diffusion Transformer (BloGDiT), is the first to address this limitation by replacing standard joint Gaussian denoising with blocked Gaussian denoising. BloGDiT uses iterative block resampling and anneals the block size over time to facilitate large, targeted edits within a block of variables. Across Sudoku, Graph Coloring, Maximum Independent Set, and MaxCut, BloGDiT matches or outperforms existing methods, demonstrating that blocked Gibbs-style diffusion provides a highly effective inductive bias for Transformer-based constraint satisfaction and optimization.

</details>


### [589] [Theoretical Analysis of Sparse Optimization with Reparameterization, Weight Decay, and Adaptive Learning Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25134)
*Huangyu Xu,Jingqin Yang,Qianqian Xu,Jiaye Teng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ReWA的新稀疏优化方法，结合重参数化、权重衰减和自适应学习率，缓解了ℓp正则化（0<p<1）因梯度无界导致的优化不稳定问题，并在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上验证了其在提升模型稀疏性的同时保持测试精度的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决ℓp正则化（0<p<1）在稀疏优化中因梯度无界导致的优化不稳定性问题。

Method: 提出ReWA方法，融合重参数化（Reparameterization）、权重衰减（Weight decay）和自适应学习率（Adaptive learning rate），构建与ℓp正则化相关但优化景观更稳定的替代方案。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上，使用ResNet模型的实验表明，ReWA相比ℓ₁正则化显著提升了模型稀疏性，同时保持了相近的测试精度。

Conclusion: ReWA是一种稳定且高效的稀疏优化新范式，为替代传统ℓp正则化提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Sparse optimization is a fundamental challenge in various practical applications. A popular approach to sparse optimization is $\ell_p$ regularization. However, it may encounter optimization instability due to the unbounded gradients when $0<p<1$. In this paper, we introduce a novel approach to sparse optimization termed ReWA, based on Reparameterization, Weight decay, and Adaptive learning rate. ReWA is closely connected to $\ell_p$-regularization, yet it unveils a distinct optimization landscape that helps mitigate instability issues. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet with ResNets demonstrate that ReWA leads to significant sparsity improvements over the $\ell_1$-regularization approach while preserving test accuracy.

</details>


### [590] [ASTRO: Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Reinforcement Optimization for GNN Powered Anomly Detection in Cyber Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25135)
*Rai Ali Yar,Umaisa Lail,Anwar Shah*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为ASTRO的自适应时空强化优化框架，结合图神经网络（GNN）、时序建模与多头注意力机制，并利用深度Q网络（DQN）动态优化异常检测阈值，在SWaT和WADI工业数据集上显著提升F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业物联网（IIoT）中传感器网络日益复杂、信号高维且时变，传统方法难以有效识别隐藏的异常行为（如虚假数据注入攻击），亟需更鲁棒、自适应的异常检测方法。

Method: 提出ASTRO框架：融合图神经网络（建模传感器空间关系）、时序模型（捕获时间依赖性）和多头注意力机制（突出关键时间步），并使用深度Q网络（DQN）对连续异常得分进行动态阈值优化，生成二元检测结果。

Result: 在SWaT数据集上F1达0.990；在复杂WADI数据集（127个设备）上F1为0.788，较SOTA方法提升约14%；多次实验验证其泛化性与稳定性。

Conclusion: ASTRO是一种高度实用、可扩展的异常检测框架，适用于大规模工业信息物理系统安全防护。

Abstract: Anomaly detection in Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) environments is essential to protect the Industrial Control Systems (ICS) and Cyber-Physical Systems (CPS) from occuring run time false data injection and other malicious attacks. The increasing complexity of sensor networks and interconnected control loops makes it difficult to identify anomalous behavior hidden within high-dimensional and time-dependent signals. To address these challenges, this article introduces Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Reinforcement Optimization ASTRO (ASTRO), a novel anomaly detection framework that pioneers the use of reinforcement learning for dynamic threshold optimization. By integrating a Deep Q-Network (DQN) with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), temporal modelling and a Multi-Head Attention mechanism, ASTRO continuously adapts its decision boundaries to improve detection accuracy. The GNN component models the spatial relations among sensors, Temporal model captures time series dependencies and the attention layer highlights most informative time steps. The model generates continuous anomaly scores, which are transformed into binary decisions using an adaptive threshold, optimized via a Deep Q-Network (DQN). The ASTRO approach is evaluated on two real world industrial benchmarks: the Secure Water Treatment (SWaT) and Water Distribution (WADI) datasets. The proposed model achieves an exceptional performance on the SWaT with F1 score of 0.990. Moreover, on highly complex 127 end devices WADI dataset, it secures F1 score of 0.788, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines by nearly 14%. Results across multiple runs confirm consistent generalization and stability. These experiments demonstrate that the ASTRO framework is highly practical and scalable method for strengthening the large scale cyber physical infrastructures

</details>


### [591] [Abduction-Deduction Entanglement: Domain Generalization via Representation Transplants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25156)
*Kasra Jalaldoust,Elias Bareinboum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于因果机制不变性的域泛化方法，通过分解最优预测为'溯因'（abduction）与'演绎'（deduction）映射，并利用表示迁移（representation transplant）约束溯因-演绎耦合，从而在源域数据下部分识别目标域最优预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 源域训练的预测模型在目标域上泛化差；而因果机制的结构性不变性虽是可靠跨域推断的基础，却无法仅从源数据中唯一识别。

Method: 将最优预测分解为溯因（从观测变量推断潜在变量）和演绎（用观测及推断变量预测标签）两部分；引入‘表示移植’线性变换来操控表示中的溯因内容、保留演绎成分；构建学习者-对抗者博弈，在理想优化下收敛至极小极大最优目标预测。

Result: 理论证明该方法可在源分布下部分识别目标最优预测；实验表明其在域泛化基准上具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 因果机制的演绎部分在域间不变，使得通过受约束的溯因-演绎解耦与参数化移植，可有效提升跨域泛化性能；该框架为域泛化提供了新的因果驱动视角。

Abstract: Prediction models trained under the source distribution do not generalize well to a different target distribution. A valid inference about an unseen data distribution must be anchored by the invariance of certain causal mechanisms that generate the source and target data, however, these structural invariances are non-identifiable from the source data alone. Under mild causal assumptions about the data, we show that the optimal prediction in the target is in fact partially identifiable by the source distribution. The result rests on a simple observation: In any domain, the optimal prediction can be factorized into what we call a pair of abduction and deduction maps, where the abduction map makes inference about some unobserved variables (possibly confounders) from the observed variables and the deduction map predicts the label using both the observed and inferred quantities. Access to large source data pins down the optimal prediction, thus constrains the valid abduction-deduction ensembles that produce it -- a non-identifiability that we call the abduction-deduction entanglement. To leverage this, we parameterize the constrained family using what we call a representation transplant, that is a specific linear transformation in the representation space that manipulates the abduction content of the representation while retaining the deduction component. Invariance of the causal mechanism generating the label implies existence of an invariant deduction map between source and target. Thus, we can search the space of plausible target distributions via a parametric transplant. We use this scheme in a learner-adversary game that, under an idealistic optimization, provably terminates with the learner having the minimax-optimal target prediction. Evaluations verify the theory, showing that the method is competitive in DG benchmarks.

</details>


### [592] [AME-TS: Anchored Mixture-of-Experts for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25166)
*Rui Wang,Renhao Xue,Ray Razi,Huan Song,Hannah R. Marlowe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AME-TS，一种结构引导的稀疏时间序列基础模型，通过将专家路由与可解释的时间结构对齐，提升预测精度与计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型多采用共享密集计算路径，忽视了时间序列在时序结构上的显著异质性；标准MoE路由难以稳定识别和保持专家的专业化。

Method: AME-TS首先用轻量级状态预测器估计序列级描述符（如可预测性、季节性、趋势、稀疏性），并映射为专家软结构先验；该先验指导token级路由，促进结构对齐的专家专业化。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval基准上，AME-TS在小规模模型中显著优于现有时间序列基础模型，在大规模下仍具竞争力，且参数激活更少；在M5微调中展现出更可解释的路由几何与更稳定的专家专业化。

Conclusion: 结构感知的路由是一种有效且可靠的方式，能充分发挥稀疏专家模型在时间序列预测中的优势。

Abstract: Time series forecasting models are increasingly scaled through large Transformer backbones, yet most existing approaches process all series through a shared dense computation path despite substantial heterogeneity in temporal structure. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) offers a natural alternative by enabling conditional computation, but standard MoE routing leaves expert specialization weakly identified and often unstable during downstream adaptation. We propose AME-TS, a structure-guided sparse time series foundation model that aligns expert routing with interpretable temporal structure. AME-TS first uses a lightweight regime predictor to estimate series-level descriptors, including forecastability, seasonality, trend, and sparsity, and maps them to a soft structural prior over experts. This series-level prior guides token-level routing during training, encouraging structure-aligned specialization. On the GIFT-Eval benchmark, AME-TS delivers a strong accuracy-efficiency tradeoff across model scales: it substantially outperforms existing time series foundation models at small model scales and remains competitive with the strongest models at larger scales, while activating substantially fewer parameters through sparse routing. We further show that AME-TS learns more interpretable routing geometry and substantially more stable expert specialization than standard MoE during fine-tuning on the M5 dataset. These results suggest that structure-aware routing is an effective and reliable way to realize the benefits of sparse expert models for time series forecasting.

</details>


### [593] [Learning Treatment Effects during Resource Allocation via Priority-Queue Randomization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25169)
*JungHo Lee,Johnna Sundberg,Pim Welle,Bryan Wilder*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在优先队列资源分配机制下进行因果推断的实验设计框架，通过将申请人按风险评分随机分入不同优先级队列，在预算约束下依队列优先级和先到先得原则分配干预，从而兼顾评估可信性与对高需求者的优先保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 公共服务项目常需在效益不确定下分配有限资源，理想情况下应随机化以支持可信评估；但现实中多采用基于需求评估的分级优先队列（如等候名单），使直接随机化难以实施。本文由此出发，构建适配该现实场景的实验设计框架。

Method: 提出一种队列随机化设计：依据申请人风险评分将其随机分配至不同优先级队列；干预按队列优先级及队内先到先得顺序、随预算释放而分配；理论分析该设计在申请者到达外生与内生两种情形下的识别性质，并设计优化的队列分配方案以权衡统计效率与高需求者优先性。

Result: 1）当申请者到达外生时，该设计实现条件随机化，可识别标准因果效应；当到达内生时，队列随机化可作为治疗的工具变量，识别由排队过程诱导的局部处理效应；2）所提优化队列分配设计在保持统计效率的同时保障高需求者优先，且传统独立同分布效率界仍适用；3）基于美国某大型县住房分配项目数据验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文为存在优先队列的实际公共资源分配场景提供了兼具政策合理性与因果识别严谨性的实验设计范式，弥合了随机对照试验理想假设与现实操作之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Public service programs often allocate limited resources under uncertainty about their benefits, creating a need for randomization to support credible evaluation. In practice, however, applicants commonly enter waitlists where resources are prioritized toward individuals judged to have higher need through tiered priority queues, making direct randomization difficult. Motivated by this, we develop an experimental design framework for learning treatment effects while treating those most in need where incoming applicants are randomized into priority queues based on their assessed risk scores. Treatments are then provided across queues in priority order and first-in-first-out within queue as budget becomes available. Our contributions are two-fold. First, we characterize what causal effects are identified under this priority-queue allocation. When arrivals are exogenous, treatments are conditionally randomized, and hence standard estimands are identified; when arrivals are endogenous, queue randomization instead provides an instrument for treatment, identifying local treatment effects induced by the queuing process. Second, we develop optimized queue-assignment designs that trade off statistical efficiency against prioritizing higher-need applicants. We show in the process that, despite dependence in treatment assignments induced by the design, usual iid efficiency bounds remain well-justified design objectives. We illustrate the proposed designs using data from a housing allocation program in a large U.S. county.

</details>


### [594] [Directional Alignment Mitigates Reward Hacking in Reinforcement Learning for Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25189)
*Wenlong Deng,Jiaji Huang,Kaan Ozkara,Yushu Li,Christos Thrampoulidis,Xiaoxiao Li,Youngsuk Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了强化学习中奖励黑客行为的几何机制，提出通过可信方向投影约束梯度，以延缓捷径利用并保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 奖励黑客行为（reward hacking）是模型通过利用代理奖励的捷径而非真正完成任务来提升表现，本文旨在从参数更新的几何角度理解其成因。

Method: 分析强化学习中语言模型参数更新的主奇异方向，识别优化漂移现象，并提出‘可信方向投影’方法，将梯度约束在干净参考子空间内。

Result: 在数学推理任务的奖励黑客实验中，该方法显著延缓了捷径利用，同时更好维持了任务性能。

Conclusion: 奖励黑客源于优化过程偏离稳定的低维学习轨迹；通过几何感知的梯度约束可有效缓解该问题。

Abstract: Reward hacking arises when a model improves a proxy reward by exploiting shortcuts rather than solving the intended task. We study this failure mode through the geometry of reinforcement learning updates in language models and argue that hacking emerges when optimization drifts away from a stable low-dimensional learning trajectory. We analyze this drift through dominant singular directions of parameter updates and show that reward-hacking runs exhibit substantially larger directional change than clean runs. Motivated by this observation, we introduce trusted-direction projection, which constrains gradients to remain within a clean reference subspace. Across reward-hacking experiments on mathematical reasoning, the proposed approach delays shortcut exploitation and better preserves task performance.

</details>


### [595] [Localization then Neutralization: Gradient-guided Token Suppression against Visual Prompt Injection Attack](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25194)
*Dongpeng Zhang,Ke Ma,Yangbangyan Jiang,Gaozheng Pei,Longtao Huang,Qianqian Xu,Qingming Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Gradient Token Masking (GTM)方法，通过梯度分析定位并屏蔽图像中关键的对抗性token，以高效防御多模态大语言模型中的提示注入攻击。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有防御方法缺乏对对抗攻击机制的系统理解，且难以兼顾效率与防御效果。

Method: 提出基于隐藏状态梯度范数（Hidden-State Gradient Norm）的token重要性评估方法，仅需一次前向-反向传播即可定位并屏蔽关键图像token。

Result: 在多种提示注入和多模态越狱攻击上，将攻击成功率（ASR）降至接近零，同时保持模型性能且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: GTM提供了一种理论可证、高效实用的对抗防御方案，揭示了对抗攻击依赖局部关键token的本质。

Abstract: Adversarial images pose a severe security threat to multimodal large language models through prompt injection. Existing defenses largely lack a principled understanding of the underlying mechanisms and struggle to balance efficiency and defense utility. In this work, we show that successful adversarial attacks do not rely on the entire image uniformly but instead depend on a small subset of critical image tokens. Based on this insight, we propose Gradient Token Masking (GTM), which localizes these tokens via gradient analysis and neutralizes them through masking. We find that attribution based on the first generated token's output probability fails when attacks preserve the predicted token. To overcome this, GTM utilizes the Hidden-State Gradient Norm score for generation-influence attribution under adversarial inputs. We prove that its ranking is consistent with that of the full adversarial loss gradient, providing a theoretical guarantee for accurate localization. Our method requires only a single forward-backward pass to identify and zero out a small number of high-scoring tokens, effectively disrupting the adversarial attack path. Extensive experiments on prompt injection and multimodal jailbreak attacks demonstrate that our approach reduces attack success rates (ASR) to near zero while preserving model utility with negligible computational overhead.

</details>


### [596] [Hide to Guide: Learning via Semantic Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25198)
*Ruitao Liu,Qinghao Hu,Alex Hu,Yecheng Wu,Shang Yang,Luke J. Huang,Zhuoyang Zhang,Han Cai,Song Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Semantic Masked Expert Policy Optimization (SMEPO)，一种面向奖励可验证强化学习（RLVR）的细粒度语义掩码策略，通过在专家轨迹的关键路径上掩蔽奖励相关语义片段（如答案、中间值、代码等），保留推理结构，迫使模型自主补全关键内容，从而缓解奖励作弊问题，在数学、代码与智能体搜索任务中显著提升准确率并加速训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有专家引导的RLVR方法易因暴露奖励相关线索（如答案、中间结果）导致策略作弊；而粗粒度截断又削弱指导效果，缺乏对‘应隐藏哪些语义内容’的精细控制。

Method: 提出SMEPO方法：基于语义识别专家轨迹中沿关键路径的reward-relevant spans（如数值、代码、实体等），对其进行掩蔽，同时保留专家的分解步骤、规划逻辑和程序结构，使模型在跟随推理路径的同时必须自主生成被掩蔽内容。

Result: 在数学、代码、智能体搜索等多个领域，SMEPO相比GRPO提升准确率最高达3.2分，训练速度加快最多4.2倍，且无需修改奖励函数或RL目标。

Conclusion: 细粒度语义掩码是一种有效且通用的专家引导机制，能在不牺牲结构指导的前提下阻断奖励作弊通道，提升RLVR在复杂推理任务中的训练效率与泛化能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a powerful paradigm for improving language models on reasoning-intensive tasks, but its effectiveness is often limited by exploration. For example, models often fail on hard problems, leaving little useful reward signal. External expert traces offer a natural source of guidance, yet they may also expose reward-relevant content along the critical path to the verifier target, such as final answers, intermediate values, executable implementations, or answer-related entities. This content can create an unintended reward hacking channel, allowing the policy to obtain reward by copying the trace rather than learning the underlying reasoning or agentic behavior. Existing guided-RL methods reduce this risk by using partial trajectories, but they mainly control how much expert information is shown heuristically rather than which parts should be hidden. To this end, we propose Semantic Masked Expert Policy Optimization (SMEPO), a fine-grained semantic masking strategy for expert-guided RLVR. Instead of truncating traces coarsely or revealing them unchanged, SMEPO masks reward-relevant semantic spans along the critical path while preserving the expert's decomposition, plan, and procedural structure. This turns hard problems from reasoning from scratch into a fill-in-the-blank process: the policy can follow the expert's problem-solving route, but must still reconstruct the missing values, code, or entities by itself. SMEPO is simple to apply and requires no changes to the reward function or RL objective. Across diverse domains, including math, code, and agentic search, SMEPO improves accuracy by up to 3.2 points over GRPO and reduces training time by up to 4.2x. The code is available at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/SMEPO.

</details>


### [597] [Influence-Inspired Spectral Rotations for Extreme Low-Bit LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25203)
*Gorgi Pavlov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BBT-spectral方法，通过WHT旋转和列重缩放优化低比特LLM权重量化，在多个模型上显著降低wikitext-2困惑度，并支持跨硬件部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决极端低比特（如W2A16）权重量化中重建误差大、频谱能量分布不均导致性能下降的问题，提升量化鲁棒性与硬件兼容性。

Method: 基于影响自适应Walsh几何理论，对线性层权重矩阵进行WHT旋转，并按Walsh基激活能量重缩放各列，再送入Intel auto-round量化器；辅以PCA替换、SO(2)旋转、MoE输入吸收等扩展技术适配不同架构。

Result: 在135M–1.5B参数的四款decoder-only模型上，BBT-spectral相较vanilla auto-round将wikitext-2困惑度相对降低15–58%；Qwen系列模型经扩展后PPL大幅下降；W2量化收益显著，W4下收益消失；量化权重可在Intel NPU/dGPU/CPU上无损运行（PPL波动<±0.1）。

Conclusion: BBT-spectral是一种高效工程方案，虽未严格迁移理论论文的布尔影响论证，但在实践中验证了频谱能量引导量化的重要性；其价值在于可部署性与跨模型泛化能力，后续需与主流量化方法（如SpinQuant、QuaRot等）进行基准对比。

Abstract: We apply the influence-adaptive Walsh geometry of a companion theory paper (arXiv:2605.01637) to extreme low-bit weight-only LLM quantization. The recipe is one math-invariant transformation: WHT-rotate each linear layer's weight matrix and rescale its columns by per-coordinate Walsh-basis activation energy before handing off to a reconstruction-error quantizer (Intel auto-round). This biases per-group integer rounding toward high-spectral-energy channels.
  On four pretrained decoder-only models from 135M to 1.5B parameters, BBT-spectral reduces wikitext-2 perplexity by 15-58% relative to vanilla auto-round at W2A16; we also report a TinyLlama-1.1B auxiliary data point. Three extensions transfer the recipe to families it failed on: a per-head PCA matrix-Gamma replacement of q_norm/k_norm for Qwen3 attention (PPL 136.76 -> 88.99 on Qwen3-0.6B); an SO(2) per-pair rotation that commutes with RoPE (PPL 36.93 -> 21.84 on Qwen2.5-1.5B); and an MoE-aware input-side absorption fix identified by architectural fuzzing of Laguna-style fused-expert layouts.
  A W2-vs-W4 ablation gives a deliberate negative control: the redistribution payoff falls within the +/-0.5 PPL noise floor at W4, consistent with the Schur-convexity intuition that the cost of unconcentrated influence vanishes as the noise budget shrinks. All quantized weights export to OpenVINO IR and run on Intel NPU + Arc dGPU + CPU with PPL invariant to device within +/-0.1.
  We do not claim a formal Boolean-to-real-valued transfer of the theory paper's majorization argument: the WHT activation energy used here is not the Boolean influence of the theory paper, the link is intuitive, and the contribution is engineering value rather than a transferred theorem. Head-to-head benchmarks against SpinQuant, QuaRot, QuIP-sharp, AQLM, OmniQuant, and ButterflyQuant at matched calibration are the main future-work item.

</details>


### [598] [Multi-Objective Learning for Diffusion Models: A Statistical Theory under Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25210)
*Ziheng Cheng,Yixiao Huang,Hanlin Zhu,Haoran Geng,Somayeh Sojoudi,Jitendra Malik,Pieter Abbeel,Xin Guo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向数据稀缺场景的扩散模型多目标学习框架，通过两阶段训练（先训练轻量专家模型，再蒸馏为通用模型）降低对配对样本的需求，并给出泛化界理论保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际部署中扩散模型常需处理多个目标分布（如不同提示域的文生图、机器人在不同环境中的策略），形成多目标学习问题；但传统方法需要高容量通用模型，导致样本复杂度上升，而配对数据往往稀缺。

Method: 提出半监督多目标学习框架：第一阶段用少量配对数据训练多个轻量级专家模型；第二阶段利用专家模型生成伪样本，蒸馏训练一个通用扩散模型；理论分析涵盖图像生成与扩散策略，并考虑策略学习中的分布偏移。

Result: 理论证明所需配对样本数仅依赖于专家模型复杂度，而非通用模型；在机器人控制和图像恢复任务上的实验验证了方法有效性及理论结论。

Conclusion: 该框架成功缓解了多目标扩散建模中模型容量与样本效率之间的矛盾，为数据受限下的通用条件生成提供了可扩展、可理论保障的新范式。

Abstract: Diffusion models are increasingly used as powerful conditional generators, yet real deployments often involve multiple target distributions arising from different tasks, e.g., diverse prompt domains in text-to-image generation, or multiple environments in robotics with diffusion policies. This naturally leads to a multi-objective learning (MOL) problem. A key challenge is that achieving good Pareto trade-offs can require a generalist model class with substantially larger capacity than what suffices for solving any individual task, thereby increasing statistical cost since sample complexity typically scales with the model complexity. To reconcile this, we develop a principled MOL framework for diffusion models with limited data: a semi-supervised regime where paired (labeled) samples are scarce, but (unlabeled) condition data are abundant. We propose a two-stage training procedure that first fits lightweight specialist models from limited paired data, and then distills them into a generalist model by generating pseudo-samples. We establish generalization bounds showing that the required number of paired samples only depends on the complexity of the specialist model classes. We further extend the theory to diffusion policies for sequential decision making to account for distribution shift in on-policy rollouts. Extensive experiments on robotic control and image restoration tasks are conducted to verify our theoretical results.

</details>


### [599] [Evolving Causal Regulatory Networks (ECR-Net)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25211)
*Govind Vallabhasseri Binish,Abdhul Ahadh,Rano Roy Kavanal,Arya Ukunde*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ECR-Net 是一种受生物启发的自适应因果发现框架，将数据生成过程建模为动态基因调控网络，利用进化算法搜索能解释环境变化（如分布偏移）的因果结构演化，从而提升模型在非平稳环境下的鲁棒泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习模型易受虚假相关干扰，难以OOD泛化；传统因果发现方法假设静态图结构，无法刻画系统随环境变化而发生的因果机制演化。

Method: 提出ECR-Net框架，将因果系统建模为局部递归、可激活/抑制的动态调控网络；采用进化搜索算法优化候选因果图，以数据重建效果为适应度；将统计分布变化视为环境冲击信号，驱动图结构的稀疏更新（如边的增删）。

Result: ECR-Net能自动识别并解释因果结构如何响应环境变化而演化，实现对非平稳数据生成机制的可解释建模。

Conclusion: ECR-Net代表一类新型自适应结构因果模型，通过建模因果机制的演化过程，为复杂动态系统中的鲁棒泛化提供了新范式。

Abstract: Modern machine learning models excel at pattern recognition but remain brittle, often failing to generalize out of distribution (OOD) because they capture spurious correlations rather than the underlying causal data-generating process. Current causal discovery methods, while powerful, typically assume a static graph structure, rendering them unable to model systems that adapt or undergo structural changes across different environments. We introduce ECR-Net, Evolving Causal Regulatory Networks, a novel, bio-inspired framework for adaptive causal mechanism discovery. Our approach models the data-generating process not as a static graph, but as a dynamic system analogous to a Gene Regulatory Network (GRN), composed of localized, recursive functions where variables can activate and inhibit one another. To discover the latent structure of this network, we employ an evolutionary search algorithm that evolves a population of candidate regulatory graphs, optimizing for a fitness function that measures how well the simulated system dynamics reconstruct the observed data. The key innovation of ECR-Net is its ability to model structural adaptation, it explicitly ingests shifts in the data's statistical properties as signals of an environmental shock. In response, the evolutionary search identifies parsimonious modifications to the causal graph topology, such as link inhibitions or activations that explain the new data regime. We posit that ECR-Net represents a new class of adaptive Structural Causal Models capable of discovering how and why a system's fundamental rules change, offering a path toward robust generalization in complex, non-stationary systems.

</details>


### [600] [Personalized Federated Learning by Energy-Efficient UAV Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25212)
*Shiqian Guo,Jianqing Liu,Beatriz Lorenzo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向地理分散型联邦学习系统的高效节能方法，通过分离全局共享骨干网络与本地个性化头，并采用基于梯度L2范数的设备调度策略，兼顾学习性能与UAV能量效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 地理分散的联邦学习系统（如偏远地区传感器网络、无人机网络）面临设备异构性（尤其是数据异构）导致收敛慢，以及全设备参与带来过高通信与能量开销的问题；同时无人机电池容量有限，亟需节能调度机制。

Method: 1）采用全局共享骨干网络 + 永久本地个性化头的严格分离架构，缓解数据异构影响；2）设计梯度L2范数驱动的调度策略：每轮仅选取梯度模值Top-α的设备更新骨干网络，聚焦高信息量更新。

Result: 仿真表明，所提方案相比SOTA方法在提升学习精度的同时，显著降低无人机能耗。

Conclusion: 分离式架构与梯度感知调度可协同解决地理分散FL中的数据异构与能源受限双重挑战，实现精度与能效的联合优化。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is an effective paradigm for enhancing the learning capability of edge devices while preserving data privacy. In geographically dispersed FL systems, such as sensor networks in remote areas, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) can flexibly establish high-quality communication links to support parameter exchange. However, device heterogeneity and the limited battery capacity of UAVs pose significant challenges. Specifically, data heterogeneity slows convergence, while scheduling all devices for global collaboration incurs excessive communication and energy costs. To overcome these challenges, we adopt a strict separation between a globally shared backbone and permanently local personalization heads, thereby mitigating the impact of data heterogeneity. Furthermore, we propose a gradient-based scheduling strategy that jointly considers energy efficiency and learning performance. In each communication round, the backbone is updated only by the top-$α$ devices ranked by gradient $\ell_{2}$-norm, ensuring that optimization focuses on the most informative updates. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed scheme achieves higher learning accuracy than state-of-the-art approaches while significantly reducing UAV energy consumption.

</details>


### [601] [Continuous-Depth Field Theory for Transformer Patching and Mechanistic Interpretability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25225)
*David N. Olivieri,Antonio F. Pérez Rodríguez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于场论的框架，用于组织和预测Transformer中激活修补等可解释性干预方法，将残差流视为深度-词元场，并通过源插入、敏感性场预测、格林函数响应等概念建模修补效应，在GPT-2模型上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机械可解释性方法（如激活修补、因果追踪等）缺乏统一的理论框架来系统组织和预测干预效果，亟需一种能刻画干预传播机制的数学语言。

Method: 将残差流建模为深度-词元场，把修补视为局域源插入，修补效应建模为敏感性场预测，下游传播建模为经验格林函数响应，修补位置选择建模为伴随变分问题，并在GPT-2类模型上实证检验前向响应理论。

Result: 发现了局部线性区间；能基于一阶敏感性跨残差位置预测修补效应；观测到深度与词元位置上的各向异性传播结构；构建了基于高敏感性位置与切片格林算子的响应描述；验证了提示引发的残差位移可迁移答案行为。

Conclusion: 敏感性、传播场和格林算子切片构成了一套实用的修补实验组织语言，并为修补位置推断与跨尺度迁移提供了前向数学基础。

Abstract: Mechanistic interpretability often uses activation patching, causal tracing, path patching, and steering directions to reveal behaviorally meaningful directions in Transformer activation space. This paper develops a field-theoretic framework for organizing and predicting such interventions. Treating the residual stream as a depth-token field, we formulate patching as localized source insertion, patch effects as sensitivity-field predictions, downstream propagation as empirical Green-function response, and patch selection as an adjoint variational problem. Empirically, we test the forward response theory in GPT-2-style autoregressive Transformers by applying localized residual-field interventions and observing the induced residual-field differences and logit-difference responses. We identify a bounded local linear regime; predict patch effects from first-order sensitivities across residual sites; measure structured anisotropic propagation across depth and token position; construct response descriptions from high-sensitivity sites and sliced Green operators; and show that prompt-induced residual displacements can transfer answer behavior. These results establish response objects, namely sensitivities, propagated fields, and Green-operator slices, as a practical language for organizing patching experiments and as the forward mathematical basis for formulating patch-site inference and cross-scale transfer.formulated.

</details>


### [602] [A Blended Likelihood Approach for Achieving Fairness Using Naive Bayes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25228)
*John Arthur Junior,Abdul Lateef Yussif,Maame G. Asante-Mensah,Charles R. Haruna,Sandro Amofa,Elliot Attipoe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种公平性感知的朴素贝叶斯分类器（BMNB），通过混合似然估计和自适应阈值校准，在保持计算效率的同时缓解算法偏见。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统朴素贝叶斯分类器缺乏公平性机制，会在招聘、信贷评分和司法等敏感领域延续历史偏见，而AI在高风险决策中应用日益广泛，亟需公平性保障。

Method: 提出Bias Mitigating Naive Bayes（BMNB）：1）在处理中阶段采用可调参数alpha融合组别特异与整体似然估计；2）在后处理阶段使用自适应阈值进行输出校准。

Result: 在Adult、ProPublica和Framingham数据集上，BMNB实现了接近理想的Disparate Impact（DI）和较优的Equal Opportunity Difference（EOD）；消融实验证明两种技术联合效果优于单独使用。

Conclusion: BMNB在不显著牺牲效率的前提下有效提升朴素贝叶斯模型的公平性，为可解释且公平的机器学习提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Concerns about algorithmic bias and fairness have increased as artificial intelligence has been incorporated into high-stakes decision-making. Traditional Naive Bayes classifiers, while efficient and interpretable, lack fairness-awareness mechanisms and perpetuate historical biases in sensitive domains such as hiring, credit scoring, and criminal justice. This study develops a fairness-aware extension of the Naive Bayes classifier that mitigates bias while maintaining computational efficiency. We propose the Bias Mitigating Naive Bayes (BMNB) classifier, integrating in-processing and post-processing interventions. The in-processing stage employs a blended likelihood approach combining group-specific and pooled likelihood estimates through a tunable blending parameter alpha to balance fairness and accuracy. The post-processing stage applies output calibration with adaptive thresholding to fine-tune group-specific decision boundaries. Experimental results indicate that BMNB attains Disparate Impact (DI) values of 1.000, 1.171, and 0.997 and Equal Opportunity Difference (EOD) values of -0.217, -0.226, and -0.053 on the Adult, ProPublica, and Framingham datasets, respectively, while maintaining computational efficiency. Ablation studies confirm that the combination of blended likelihood and adaptive thresholding yields superior performance compared to either technique in isolation.

</details>


### [603] [On the Epistemic Uncertainty of Overparametrized Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25234)
*David Rügamer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了过参数化神经网络中由于参数不可识别性导致的认知不确定性（epistemic uncertainty）无法完全消除的问题，尤其分析了一层ReLU网络中离散与连续对称性引起的残余不确定性，并通过理论与实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上将认知不确定性视为随数据增加而消失的可约减不确定性，但该假设依赖于参数可识别性；而在过参数化神经网络中，参数常因对称性和冗余表示而不可识别，导致即使函数被完全确定，参数不确定性仍持续存在。

Method: 从参数不可识别性的角度重新分析认知不确定性，区分离散和连续来源的残余不确定性；以单隐藏层ReLU网络为具体对象，系统分析其后验分布结构。

Result: 揭示了一层ReLU网络中由对称性（如神经元排列、符号翻转、缩放不变性）导致的后验非唯一性与不确定性结构，并通过实证研究验证了理论分析。

Conclusion: 认知不确定性不能简单等同于预测变异性，其在过参数化模型中受不可识别性主导，需在贝叶斯推断与不确定性建模中显式考虑对称性结构。

Abstract: Epistemic uncertainty is often viewed as a reducible uncertainty that vanishes with increasing data. This perspective implicitly assumes parameter identifiability and equates epistemic uncertainty with predictive variability. In overparametrized neural networks, however, model parameters are typically non-identifiable due to symmetries and redundant representations. As a consequence, substantial parameter uncertainty can persist even when the underlying function is fully identified. In this work, we analyze epistemic uncertainty through the lens of non-identifiability and characterize both discrete and continuous sources of residual uncertainty. Focusing on one-hidden-layer ReLU networks, we thoroughly analyze the resulting posterior structure and validate our theoretical insights through empirical studies.

</details>


### [604] [Constraint-Anchored Attribution: Feasibility-Certified Counterfactuals and Bonferroni-PAC Sufficient Subsets for Neural CO Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25235)
*Sohaib Lafifi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对神经组合优化（CO）策略的归因方法，结合LP松弛对偶、CSP可行性验证与Bonferroni校正的Hoeffding检验，显著提升归因准确性与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经CO策略缺乏可靠、可验证的决策归因机制，尤其在约束分解、反事实验证和统计可信解释方面存在不足。

Method: 提出Λ-归因法：(i) 基于LP松弛对偶按约束族分解决策；(ii) 利用CSP可行性模型认证反事实；(iii) 采用Bonferroni校正的Hoeffding充分子集检验确定PAC保证下的最小解释规模。

Result: 在CVRPTW和Orienteering问题上，Λ-归因与CF信号匹配率分别达96.5%和77.2%，显著优于代理梯度法（p ≤ 10⁻¹⁴）；在FJSP中，两种方法对所有CSP认证翻转完全一致；平均PAC解释规模为每步5.0个节点。

Conclusion: Λ-归因法实现了理论可证、组合可行、统计可靠的神经CO策略归因，在多个标准问题上展现出高一致性与紧凑解释性。

Abstract: We give an attribution method for neural combinatorial-optimisation (CO) policies that (i) decomposes a decision by constraint families via LP-relaxation duals, (ii) certifies counterfactuals through a combinatorial feasibility model (implemented as a CSP feasibility-decision model), and (iii) bounds the size of a PAC-sufficient explanation with a Bonferroni-corrected Hoeffding sufficient-subset test along a greedy ordering. Across three CO problems and three seeds, our LP-anchored $Λ$-attribution matches the CF-derived signal at 96.5% on CVRPTW (n_cert=344) and 77.2% on the Orienteering Problem (n_cert=281) vs 75.0% and 35.2% for proxy gradient (paired diffs +0.215 and +0.420; McNemar exact $p \le 10^{-14}$). In the rank-aligned regime of the Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling Problem, both backends agree on every CSP-certified flip (n_cert=59), confirming the no-gain prediction. Bonferroni-PAC subsets average 5.0 nodes per step ($M=70$, $\varepsilon=δ=0.2$, $k_{\max}=25$). Reference implementation: https://github.com/sohaibafifi/neuro-co-cax

</details>


### [605] [Quantifying Empirical Compute-Supervision Tradeoffs in RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25252)
*Ryo Mitsuhashi,Patrick Chen,Isabelle Tseng,Jasin Cekinmez,Addison J. Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过实验验证了在强化学习中使用有噪声的验证器对语言模型后训练的影响，发现验证器噪声（尤其是假阴性）会持续影响最终性能，且单纯增加计算资源无法弥补这一差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管理论预测验证器噪声只影响学习速度而不影响最终结果，但实践中验证器往往不完美，因此需要实证检验该预测是否成立。

Method: 在GSM8K数据集上，对Qwen2.5（0.5B和1.5B）模型使用GRPO算法进行后训练，人为注入可控的假阳性与假阴性噪声，并改变每条提示的采样数（rollouts）以模拟不同计算规模。

Result: 验证器噪声导致的验证准确率差距在大幅增加计算资源后仍持续存在，且计算收益急剧递减；假阴性比假阳性对性能的损害更严重、更快速。

Conclusion: 验证器质量与训练计算量不可互换，降低假阴性率比单纯扩大计算量更有效。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a standard paradigm for post-training language models, but in practice, verifiers are rarely perfect. Recent theoretical work predicts that verifier noise affects the rate of learning but not its final outcome, implying that sufficient compute should close any gap induced by imperfect supervision. We test this prediction empirically by post-training Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B) with GRPO on GSM8K while injecting controlled false-positive and false-negative noise into the binary correctness signal, and varying rollouts per prompt as a compute axis. In practice, the gap in validation accuracy persists under substantial compute scaling, with returns to compute that are sharply diminishing. We further find a structural asymmetry where false negatives monotonically degrade performance quicker than with false positives. These findings suggest verifier quality and training compute are not interchangeable, and that reducing false negatives is a more effective lever than scaling compute alone.

</details>


### [606] [Latent Q-Barrier Shielding for Safe In-Context Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25267)
*Minjae Kwon,Amir Moeini,Shangtong Zhang,Lu Feng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为latent Q-Barrier shield的机制，用于提升在分布外（OOD）场景下安全上下文强化学习（ICRL）的奖励-安全性权衡能力。该shield通过预训练学习上下文表征、潜在动力学和成本批评模型，在无参数更新前提下，利用历史推断上下文并基于剩余预算与预测未来成本对候选动作进行过滤或重加权。理论证明其满足条件性误差分解的屏障裕度性质，实验表明其在多个基准上优于强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练-only的安全ICRL在OOD部署偏移下表现不佳，因剩余安全预算仅通过冻结策略条件作用，缺乏显式的动作级未来成本检查。

Method: 提出latent Q-Barrier shield：预训练学习上下文表示、潜在动力学及集成成本批评器；部署时无参数更新，基于历史推断上下文，并用剩余预算与预测未来成本对候选动作进行过滤或软重加权。

Result: 在五个安全ICRL基准上，该shield在短上下文窗口后即实现四/五任务更高回报，且所有五任务平均episode成本不高于或低于基线。

Conclusion: latent Q-Barrier shield能有效提升OOD环境下安全ICRL的实时奖励-安全性权衡，兼具理论保障与实证优势。

Abstract: Safe in-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) adapts online from interaction history without test-time parameter updates while controlling episode cost under a safety budget. Under out-of-distribution (OOD) deployment shifts, pretraining-only safe ICRL can give poor reward-safety tradeoffs because the remaining budget affects behavior only through frozen policy conditioning, not an explicit action-level check against predicted future cost. We propose a latent Q-Barrier shield that learns a context representation, latent dynamics, and an ensemble cost critic before deployment. Without parameter updates, the shield infers context from history and filters or softly reweights candidate actions using the remaining budget and predicted future cost. We prove a conditional, error-decomposed barrier-margin result: a Q-Barrier-satisfying action leaves the next latent-budget state with an approximately budget-safe continuation under the learned critic, up to Bellman and latent-prediction errors. Across five safe ICRL benchmarks, the shield improves deployment-time reward-safety tradeoffs over a strong safe-ICRL baseline: after a short context window, it achieves higher return in four of five benchmarks while matching or lowering average episode cost in all five.

</details>


### [607] [Label-NTK Alignments and A Tighter Convergence Bound in the NTK Regime](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25275)
*Ruchirinkil Marreddy,Chaoyue Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过分析标签与神经正切核（NTK）特征谱之间的对齐关系，提出了更紧致的收敛性界，显著优于传统依赖最小特征值的悲观结果，并给出改进的泛化界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有NTK理论的收敛保证过于悲观，因其依赖极小的NTK最小特征值，无法解释实际中快速训练的现象。

Method: 提出Label-NTK alignment和Residual-NTK alignment两个关键现象，刻画标签与残差在NTK特征向量上的投影随对应特征值缩放的规律；在此基础上推导依赖全谱的精细收敛界和泛化界。

Result: 获得更紧致、与实际训练动态高度吻合的收敛速率界及改进的泛化界，并在MLP和CNN及多个数据集上验证了理论。

Conclusion: NTK动态的实际效率源于标签和残差与NTK谱的内在对齐，而非最坏情况下的最小特征值；该洞察推动了更贴近实践的深度学习理论分析。

Abstract: The Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) framework explains optimization in over-parameterized neural networks via approximately linearized dynamics, yielding exponential convergence guarantees. However, existing results are often overly pessimistic and do not match the fast training in practice, as they depend on the smallest NTK eigenvalue, which is typically extremely small in practice. In this work, we develop sharper convergence guarantees by characterizing the interaction between data labels and the NTK eigen-spectrum. We identify two key phenomena, Label-NTK alignment and Residual-NTK alignment, showing that projections of labels and residuals onto NTK eigenvectors scale with the corresponding eigenvalues. We provide empirical evidence and theoretical justification under mild data assumptions. Exploiting these alignment properties, we derive a refined convergence bound that depends on the full spectrum and closely matches practical training dynamics, significantly improving over classical worst-case results. We further obtain improved generalization bounds. Experiments on MLPs and CNNs across multiple datasets validate our theory.

</details>


### [608] [When Interpretability Becomes a Liability: Adversarial Attacks on CBM Concept Layers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25304)
*Aditya Sridhar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）在概念层面上存在新型对抗攻击面，并提出SPECTRA防御方法显著提升其鲁棒性，同时保持高分类精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: CBMs虽具可解释性，但其概念瓶颈层引入了此前未被探索的对抗攻击面，亟需系统研究其脆弱性并提出防御方案。

Method: 建立概念空间鲁棒性的理论框架与新度量指标；在CUB-200-2011上开展实证分析；提出基于语义扰动的概念训练方法SPECTRA，作为稳定性正则化防御。

Result: 标准CBMs在概念层面高度脆弱；SPECTRA将成功攻击所需最小扰动范数从0.46提升至超4200，且分类精度仅下降2.2%。

Conclusion: 概念级攻击是一种全新威胁模型，本工作开辟了可解释机器学习与对抗鲁棒性交叉领域的新研究方向。

Abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) have emerged as a cornerstone approach for interpretable machine learning, providing human-understandable intermediate representations through explicit concept activations. However, this interpretability fundamentally introduces a critical, previously unexplored attack surface: the concept bottleneck layer itself. We present a comprehensive, systematic study of concept-level adversarial vulnerabilities in CBMs, revealing that targeted, minimal perturbations operating on input pixels can induce catastrophic misclassification by manipulating semantic representations. We develop a rigorous theoretical framework to quantify concept-space robustness, establishing novel metrics that expose the vulnerability landscape of these architectures. Our extensive analysis on the CUB-200-2011 dataset demonstrates that standard CBMs exhibit severe susceptibility to concept-level manipulation. To address this critical weakness, we introduce SPECTRA (Semantic Perturbation-based Concept Training for Robustness against Attacks), a principled stability regularization defense. SPECTRA effectively hardens the semantic representation space, increasing the minimal perturbation norm required for a successful attack from 0.46 to over 4,200, rendering targeted concept manipulation computationally prohibitive. Furthermore, SPECTRA preserves baseline classification accuracy to within 2.2%. By establishing concept-level attacks as a fundamentally distinct threat model, this work opens a new research frontier at the intersection of interpretable machine learning and adversarial robustness.

</details>


### [609] [Electricity Consumption Forecasting: An Approach Using Cooperative Ensemble Learning with SHapley Additive exPlanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25305)
*Eduardo Luiz Alba,Gilson Adamczuk Oliveira,Matheus Henrique Dal Molin Ribeiro,Érick Oliveira Rodrigues*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种名为Weaker Separator Booster（WSB）的协同集成学习方法，结合SHAP特征选择与GA/PSO超参数优化，利用历史用电与气象数据预测两所大学校园未来12个月的电力消耗，取得了优于LSTM、RF、SVR和XGBoost的预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高校电力需求快速增长且环境影响显著，亟需高精度长期用电预测以支持节能管理与可持续发展决策。

Method: 采用LSTM、RF、SVR、XGBoost及自研WSB模型，基于IFPR两校区七年历史用电数据与气象变量进行12个月超前预测；结合SHAP进行特征重要性分析，并用遗传算法（GA）和粒子群优化（PSO）进行超参数调优。

Result: WSB模型在Palmas校区取得sMAPE=13.90%、MAE=1990.87 kWh，在Coronel Vivida校区取得sMAPE=18.72%、MAE=465.02 kWh；SHAP分析显示滞后时间序列特征主导预测，气象变量影响微弱。

Conclusion: WSB集成方法在高校长期电力负荷预测中表现最优；特征重要性具有校区异质性，但均凸显时序滞后项的关键作用，表明纯时间模式比外部气象因素更具预测价值。

Abstract: Electricity expense management presents significant challenges, as this resource is susceptible to various influencing factors. In universities, the demand for this resource is rapidly growing with institutional expansion and has a significant environmental impact. In this study, the machine learning models long short-term memory (LSTM), random forest (RF), support vector regression (SVR), and extreme gradient boosting (XGBoost) were trained with historical consumption data from the Federal Institute of Paraná (IFPR) over the last seven years and climatic variables to forecast electricity consumption 12 months ahead. Datasets from two campuses were adopted. To improve model performance, feature selection was performed using Shapley additive explanations (SHAP), and hyperparameter optimization was carried out using genetic algorithm (GA) and particle swarm optimization (PSO). The results indicate that the proposed cooperative ensemble learning approach named Weaker Separator Booster (WSB) exhibited the best performance for datasets. Specifically, it achieved an sMAPE of 13.90% and MAE of 1990.87 kWh for the IFPR-Palmas Campus and an sMAPE of 18.72% and MAE of 465.02 kWh for the Coronel Vivida Campus. The SHAP analysis revealed distinct feature importance patterns across the two IFPR campuses. A commonality that emerged was the strong influence of lagged time-series values and a minimal influence of climatic variables.

</details>


### [610] [CausalFlow: Causal Attribution and Counterfactual Repair for LLM Agent Failures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25338)
*Akash Bonagiri,Devang Borkar,Gerard Janno Anderias,Setareh Rafatirad,Houman Homayoun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CausalFlow框架，通过因果干预分析LLM智能体失败执行轨迹，生成最小反事实修复和可重用监督信号，提升多步任务中的推理、工具使用与环境交互可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在多步任务中常失败，而失败日志蕴含结构化诊断信号，但现有方法仅简单重试或丢弃，未充分利用这些信号。

Method: 将执行轨迹建模为依赖步骤链，通过步骤级反事实干预计算因果责任得分（CRS）定位致败步骤，并生成最小编辑的修复，形成（错误步骤，修正步骤）对比对；支持测试时定向修复与训练时离线偏好优化/奖励建模。

Result: 在数学推理、代码生成、问答和医疗浏览四大基准上，CausalFlow生成高最小性与因果共识度的验证修复，在复杂检索场景中优于启发式改进，并产生更局部化的修复。

Conclusion: 基于结构化执行轨迹的因果干预分析，可将智能体失败系统性转化为可靠性提升与学习就绪的监督信号，是一种原则性强且可扩展的方法。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents frequently fail on multi-step tasks involving reasoning, tool use, and environment interaction. While such failures are typically logged or retried heuristically, they contain structured signals about where execution broke down. We introduce CausalFlow, an interventional framework that converts failed agent traces into minimal counterfactual repairs and reusable supervision. CausalFlow models execution traces as sequential chains of dependent steps and computes Causal Responsibility Scores(CRS) via step-level counterfactual intervention to identify failure-inducing steps. For these steps, we generate minimally edited repairs that flip the final outcome to success, producing validated contrastive pairs of the form (wrong step, corrected step). CausalFlow supports two complementary uses: targeted test-time repair that recovers from failures with minimal behavioral drift, and training-time supervision suitable for offline preference optimization or reward modeling. Across four benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and medical browsing, CausalFlow converts failed executions into validated minimal repairs with high minimality and causal-consensus scores, and demonstrates that causal attribution is necessary for reliable improvement across diverse agent tasks, outperforming heuristic refinement in complex retrieval settings while producing more localized repairs throughout. These results demonstrate that interventional analysis over structured execution traces provides a principled and scalable mechanism for transforming agent failures into reliability gains and learning-ready supervision.

</details>


### [611] [Certified Robustness from Approximate Gaussian Mixture Structures in Pretrained Latent Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25352)
*Konstantinos Emmanouilidis,Tianjiao Ding,Nghia Nguyen,Nicolas Loizou,René Vidal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用数据潜在结构设计可证明鲁棒分类器的新框架，证明即使预训练编码器仅近似地将输入映射为高斯混合分布（KL散度ε-接近），其可证明鲁棒性仍能优雅退化；在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上实现了SOTA或具竞争力的认证准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有经验性防御缺乏形式化保证，而现有可证明鲁棒方法因无法利用复杂数据分布的结构而过于保守，亟需兼顾理论保证与实际性能的新方法。

Method: 提出基于潜在结构的可证明鲁棒分类框架：先在高斯混合假设下推导鲁棒分类器存在性条件并构造闭式鲁棒性证书；再证明当预训练编码器输出分布KL散度ε-接近高斯混合时，认证精度随ε优雅退化，从而放宽对精确分布假设的要求。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上达到SOTA或具有竞争力的认证准确率，同时保持强干净精度和低计算开销。

Conclusion: 近似潜在结构是实现可证明鲁棒性的实用且有原则的路径，使预训练模型可直接用于认证鲁棒性而无需严格分布假设。

Abstract: Deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, raising important concerns for safety-critical deployment. Empirical defenses can achieve strong robustness in practice, but lack formal guarantees, motivating the need for certifiably robust classifiers. While certified methods provide formal guarantees, they often yield overly conservative bounds due to their inability to exploit structure in complex data distributions. In this work, we propose a framework for designing certifiably robust classifiers that leverages latent structure in data representations. We first analyze the Gaussian mixture setting, deriving necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of robust classifiers and constructing a classifier with a closed-form robustness certificate and generalization guarantees. Our main contribution is to show that exact structure is not required: we prove that if a pretrained encoder maps inputs to a latent distribution that is $\varepsilon$-close (in KL divergence) to a Gaussian mixture, then certified accuracy degrades gracefully, with an explicit bound relating robustness under the true and approximate distributions. This result enables the direct use of pretrained models without requiring exact distributional assumptions. Empirically, our method achieves state-of-the-art or competitive certified accuracy on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet, while maintaining strong clean performance and low computational overhead. Overall, our work establishes approximate latent structure as a practical and principled route to certifiable robustness.

</details>


### [612] [PDEInvBench: A Comprehensive Dataset and Design Space Exploration of Neural Networks for PDE Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25353)
*Divyam Goel,Nithin Chalapathi,Sanjeev Raja,Aditi S. Krishnapriyan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了PDEInvBench，首个面向偏微分方程（PDE）逆问题的综合性基准数据集，并系统评估了神经网络在参数估计任务中的设计选择，涵盖优化目标、问题表征与模型/数据缩放三方面，得出若干实用训练策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习PDE研究集中于正向问题，缺乏针对逆问题（由解场反推物理参数）的统一基准与系统评估。

Method: 构建涵盖时变与时不变PDE、多物理行为及参数范围的数值模拟基准PDEInvBench；设计三维度实验：优化目标（监督/自监督/测试时训练）、问题表征（架构先验与条件策略）、模型与数据规模缩放。

Result: 发现：1）两阶段训练（先监督后基于PDE残差的测试时微调）效果最优；2）将PDE导数作为输入特征显著提升精度；3）增加初始条件多样性比扩大参数范围更能提升性能。

Conclusion: PDEInvBench填补了PDE逆问题基准空白，实验揭示了关键设计原则，为后续方法开发与评估提供了坚实基础和开源资源。

Abstract: Inverse problems in partial differential equations (PDEs) involve estimating the physical parameters of a system from observed spatiotemporal solution fields.Neural networks are well-suited for PDE parameter estimation due to their capability to model function-to-function space transformations. While existing benchmarks of machine learning methods for PDEs primarily focus on the forward problem, there are no similar comprehensive studies and benchmark datasets on PDE inverse problems, i.e., mapping solution fields to underlying physical parameters. We fill this gap by introducing PDEInvBench, a comprehensive benchmark dataset consisting of numerical simulations for both time-dependent and time-independent PDEs across a wide range of physical behaviors and parameters. Our dataset includes evaluation splits that assess performance in both in-distribution and various out-of-distribution settings. Using our benchmark dataset, we comprehensively explore the design space of neural networks for PDE inverse problems along three key dimensions: (1) optimization procedures, analyzing the role of supervised, self-supervised, and test-time training objectives on performance, (2) problem representations, where we study the value of architectural choices with different inductive biases and various conditioning strategies, and (3) scaling, which we perform with respect to both model and data size. Our experiments reveal several practical insights: 1) neural networks perform best with a two-stage training procedure: initial supervision with PDE parameters followed by test-time fine-tuning using the PDE residual, 2) incorporating PDE derivatives as input features consistently improves accuracy, and 3) increasing the diversity of initial conditions in the training data yields greater performance gains than expanding the range of PDE parameters. We make our dataset and codebase publicly available.

</details>


### [613] [Not only where, But when: Temporal Scheduling for RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25381)
*Jinghao Zhang,Ruilin Li,Feng Zhao,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出在强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）中引入时间维度的信用分配调度机制，通过动态调整不同训练阶段对特定token行为的关注程度，提升大语言模型后训练的稳定性和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法在信用分配上采用静态标准，忽视了策略行为在轨迹中的异质性，限制了策略的稳健演化。

Method: 引入时间维度的信用分配调度机制，优先关注体现特定策略行为的目标token，并随训练进程逐渐过渡到通用优化；利用轨迹百分位数自然区分策略行为并配合时间调度。

Result: 实验表明该方法在数学与通用推理基准上均取得一致性能提升，且策略熵下降更平缓，策略演化更健康。

Conclusion: 时间调度是一种有前景的RLVR优化新维度，能有效缓解异质策略行为冲突，提升训练稳定性与效率。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a core technique for post-training of Large Language Models (LLMs). While policy optimization is driven by all sampled tokens under a globally broadcast scalar reward, the heterogeneous policy behaviors exhibited along trajectories are largely overlooked without differentiation. Existing works address this by credit allocation, including token-level advantage reweighting, and selective token optimization, however, the allocation criterion are principally stagnant throughout training, limiting resilient policy evolution. In this work, we argue that \textit{when} learning signals are scheduled can be as important as \textit{where} they are allocated across tokens, and introduce the temporal dimension that scheduling the credit allocation criteria over the course of RLVR optimization. We find that prioritizing targeted tokens emphasized with specific policy behaviors, and gradually attenuating toward general optimization leads to more stable and efficient learning dynamics. Furthermore, we show that simple trajectory percentiles provide a natural perspective for distinguishing policy behaviors, and works effectively with temporal scheduling. Our analysis reveals that standard optimization substantially sacrifices policy entropy when simultaneously accommodating heterogeneous behaviors, whereas temporal scheduling yields healthier policy evolution dynamics. Experiments across mathematical and general reasoning benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements, suggesting that temporal scheduling constitutes a promising optimization dimension.

</details>


### [614] [ViroBench: Benchmarking Nucleotide Foundation Models on Viral Genomics Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25388)
*Dongxin Ye,Fang Hu,Han Hu,Shu Hu,Yang Tan,Wanli Ouyang,Stan Z. Li,Jie Cui,Nanqing Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了ViroBench，首个面向病毒基因组分析的核苷酸基础模型（NFM）综合基准，涵盖生物学理解与生物安全风险两大维度，评估发现NFMs在系统发育和时间迁移下表现下降、生成任务中统计似然与生物功能有效性脱钩，并指出预训练数据的分类多样性比模型参数规模更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前核苷酸基础模型（NFMs）在病毒基因组分析中缺乏统一标准，制约社区发展与生物安全管控。

Method: 构建ViroBench基准，覆盖18种场景、4类任务，从生物学理解和潜在生物安全风险两方面评估66个NFMs，并开展消融实验分析预训练数据多样性与模型规模的影响。

Result: 1）NFMs在系统发育和时间偏移下生物学理解能力显著下降；2）生成任务中高概率序列未必具生物功能有效性，存在潜在生物安全风险；3）预训练数据的分类多样性比参数规模对性能影响更大，轻量基线模型在多样数据上训练后性能提升67.5%。

Conclusion: ViroBench为病毒NFM研究提供了可解释、可诊断、可复现的评估框架，推动兼顾生物学有效性与生物安全性的模型发展。

Abstract: Nucleotide sequences constitute the fundamental genetic basis of biological systems, rendering viral genomic analysis critical for biomedical advancement. Despite progress in biological foundation models, specifically nucleotide foundation models (NFMs), the field lacks a unified standard for viral genomics to facilitate community development and enforce biosecurity constraints. To address this, we introduce ViroBench, the first comprehensive and large-scale benchmark specifically designed for NFMs in viral settings. ViroBench evaluates models across two critical dimensions: biological understanding and latent biosecurity risk, covering 18 diverse scenarios within 4 task types. Extensive evaluation of 66 NFMs across diverse architectures yields three critical conclusions. Firstly, NFMs exhibit a performance degradation in biological understanding under phylogenetic and temporal shifts, indicating weak extrapolation capabilities. Secondly, generation tasks reveal a decoupling between statistical likelihood and biological functional validity, posing latent biosecurity risks. Thirdly, controlled ablation studies reveal that taxonomic diversity in pretraining data outweighs parameter scale. Specifically, a lightweight baseline trained on diverse data achieves a 67.5% performance gain over its original model. Overall, ViroBench provides interpretable, diagnostic evaluations and a reproducible measurement framework for future research on viral nucleotide foundation models. The datasets and code are publicly available at https://github.com/QIANJINYDX/ViroBench.

</details>


### [615] [A Context Augmented Multi-Play Multi-Armed Bandit Algorithm for Fast Channel Allocation in Opportunistic Spectrum Access](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25391)
*Ruiyu Li,Guangxia Li,Xiao Lu,Jichao Liu,Yan Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在机会频谱接入（OSA）场景中考虑信道噪声影响的非平稳上下文多臂赌博机（MP-MAB）问题，提出将信道状态信息作为上下文、信道噪声建模为奖励扰动，并分别针对线性和非线性相关性设计了两种基于估计噪声调整上置信界的索引策略，实验表明其具有更低的遗憾值和更合理的次优臂选择。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MP-MAB方法在真实OSA系统中不实用：假设理想条件、计算开销大，且忽略直接影响服务质量的信道噪声。

Method: 将信道噪声建模为臂奖励函数的扰动；利用信道状态信息（CSI）作为上下文刻画该扰动；针对上下文与扰动间的线性和非线性相关性，分别构建线性模型和神经网络学习相关性，并用估计噪声修正上置信界（UCB）。

Result: 所提两种索引策略在数值实验中实现了更低的累积遗憾，并能更合理地选择次优臂。

Conclusion: 引入上下文感知的噪声建模并动态调整UCB，可显著提升MP-MAB在真实OSA场景中的实用性与性能。

Abstract: We study the restless contextual multi-play multi-armed bandit (MP-MAB) problem for channel allocation in the opportunity spectrum access (OSA) scenario. Most existing MP-MAB methods are impractical for real-world OSA systems as they assume many ideal conditions, incur a heavy computational cost, and most importantly, ignore the impact of channel noise which is directly related to the quality of service. In this study, we embody this impact by modeling channel noise as a perturbation of the arm's reward function in MP-MAB. As there is an implicit correlation between channel state information and channel noise, we take the former as a context for MP-MAB to present the perturbation caused by the latter. We investigate two types of correlation between the context and the perturbation -- linear and nonlinear, and derive two index policies, respectively. These policies learn the correlations through a linear model and a neural network, and use estimated noise value to adjust the upper confidence bound. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed policies can achieve lower regret and select sub-optimal arms in a more reasonable way.

</details>


### [616] [EMA-Nesterov: Stabilizing Nesterov's Lookahead for Accelerated Deep Learning Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25395)
*Chung-Yiu Yau,Dawei Li,Athanasios Glentis,Valentyn Boreiko,Hoi-To Wai,Mingyi Hong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EMA-Nesterov，用指数移动平均（EMA）替代Nesterov动量中的短视距外推方向，以稳定优化轨迹、抑制噪声，同时保持对训练趋势的自适应性；理论证明其在凸问题中保持加速收敛率，并在语言模型预训练中验证了其对多种主流优化器的兼容性和优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Lookahead方法依赖于噪声大、不稳定的一阶迭代差分信号，在深度学习的随机梯度和非凸场景下表现不可靠；需从轨迹低频趋势出发设计更鲁棒的加速机制。

Method: 提出EMA-Nesterov：将Nesterov动量中的标准外推方向替换为参数更新量的指数移动平均（EMA），利用EMA的低通滤波特性提取优化轨迹的长期趋势，并通过其几何加权结构保持对动态变化的适应性。

Result: 理论层面：在凸优化问题中保持类Nesterov的加速收敛率；实验层面：在语言模型预训练任务中显著优于现有Lookahead方法，且兼容Adam、SOAP、Muon、NanoGPT等各类基优化器，提升稳定性与泛化性能。

Conclusion: EMA-Nesterov通过轨迹视角重构Nesterov加速，以EMA实现稳健、自适应的长程外推，解决了传统Lookahead在深度学习中因噪声和非凸性导致的不稳定性问题，为优化算法设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Lookahead-based acceleration methods, such as Nesterov's momentum, are widely used in optimization, but they often become unreliable in deep learning training mainly due to stochastic gradient noise and non-convex loss landscapes. In particular, standard lookahead relies on short-horizon update signals (e.g., differences between consecutive iterates), which are inherently noisy and can lead to unstable extrapolation directions. This work revisits Nesterov's acceleration from a trajectory perspective and argues that effective acceleration in deep learning should harness the low-frequency trends of optimization trajectories rather than extrapolating noisy one-step updates. Leveraging this insight, we propose EMA-Nesterov, a simple modification that replaces the standard Nesterov's lookahead direction with an exponential moving average (EMA) of parameter updates. This yields a stabilized lookahead direction that captures and harnesses the evolving trend of the training trajectory through a low-pass filter, while remaining adaptive to progressive changes via the geometric weighting structure of EMA. We show that EMA-Nesterov retains a theoretical accelerated convergence rate in convex problems that is analogous to Nesterov's accelerated gradient method. Furthermore, we provide empirical evidence on language model pre-training to verify that EMA-Nesterov is broadly applicable across a range of fine-tuned base optimizers, including Adam, SOAP, Muon, as well as complex optimizers that achieve state-of-the-art performance on optimization benchmarks (NanoGPT). Compared to prior lookahead methods, EMA-Nesterov achieves better performance by avoiding the instability of short-horizon lookahead and the non-adaptivity of long-horizon lookahead.

</details>


### [617] [Adaptive Preference Optimization with Uncertainty-aware Utility Anchor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.10515)
*Xiaobo Wang,Zixia Jia,Jiaqi Li,Qi Liu,Zilong Zheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的离线偏好优化框架UAPO，通过引入效用锚点（Utility Anchor）来估计标注数据中的不确定性，从而克服传统DPO类方法对成对数据、人类理性假设等的依赖，支持非成对数据训练并提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统DPO类方法依赖Bradley-Terry模型，存在需成对数据、模型分布偏移、人类理性假设等关键限制，限制了数据利用效率与鲁棒性。

Method: 提出自适应偏好优化框架UAPO，引入锚定函数建模偏好标注中的不确定性，支持非成对数据训练，并增强训练稳定性。

Result: UAPO在无需严格成对数据条件下仍取得具有竞争力的性能，显著提升数据利用率和训练鲁棒性。

Conclusion: UAPO为离线偏好优化提供了更灵活、高效且鲁棒的新范式，缓解了现有方法的关键假设约束。

Abstract: Offline preference optimization methods are efficient for large language models (LLMs) alignment. Direct Preference optimization (DPO)-like learning, one of the most popular approaches, stands out for its efficiency in reward modeling. However, these methods typically follow the convention to use Bradley-Terry (BT) reward modeling that faces several critical assumptions, including the requirement for pairwise training data, model distribution shifting, human rationality assumption, etc. To address these limitations, we propose a general framework for offline preference optimization methods, Adaptive Preference Optimization with Utility Anchor (UAPO), which introduces an anchoring function to estimate the uncertainties brought from preference data annotation. Our method enables training even in scenarios where the data is unpaired, significantly enhancing data utilization efficiency. Moreover, the anchor design makes UAPO more robust in the training process. Experimental results demonstrate that UAPO achieves competitive outcomes without the strict dependency on data pairing, paving the way for more flexible and effective preference optimization methods.

</details>


### [618] [Autoregression-Free Neural Operators for Time-Dependent PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25413)
*Jiaquan Zhang,Caiyan Qin,Haoyu Bian,Libin Cai,Yi Lu,Chaoning Zhang,Wei Dong,Yuanfang Guo,Yang Yang,Hen Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需自回归的神经算子（AFNO），通过将PDE的时间演化映射到潜在空间并在其中建模连续时间向量场，利用流匹配学习潜在向量场，从而避免自回归误差累积，提升长时间预测稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子在长时间预测时依赖自回归滚动，导致误差累积，且缺乏连续时间建模能力。

Method: AFNO将PDE时间演化映射至潜在空间，用流匹配学习该空间中的连续时间向量场，并显式地以物理参数为条件建模不同参数配置下的动力学。

Result: 理论分析与六个PDE上的实验表明，AFNO显著提升了长时间预测的稳定性，一致降低了滚动误差。

Conclusion: AFNO通过摆脱自回归结构和引入连续时间潜在动力学建模，在长时程PDE求解中实现了更鲁棒、更准确的预测性能。

Abstract: Neural operators learn mappings from function-dependent inputs to solutions, providing an effective framework for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). For time-dependent PDEs, existing methods typically perform long-horizon prediction through autoregressive rollout directly in high-dimensional physical field spaces, where each predicted state is recursively fed back as the input for the next step. Although effective for short-term prediction, this autoregressive rollout and the lack of continuous-time modeling lead to progressive error accumulation over long-horizon rollouts. In this work, we propose Autoregression-Free Neural Operators (AFNO), which map the time evolution of PDEs into a latent space and model continuous-time vector fields within it. AFNO uses flow matching to learn the latent vector field, thereby enabling continuous evolution over extended horizons, avoiding autoregressive rollout and capturing dynamics under varying parameter configurations through explicit conditioning on physical parameters. Theoretical analysis and extensive experiments on six PDEs demonstrate that AFNO improves long-horizon prediction stability and consistently reduces rollout errors compared with the baselines.

</details>


### [619] [Capture-Calibrate-Coach: A Graph-Based Framework for Knowledge Monitoring Estimation and Adaptive Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25419)
*Gen Li,Li Chen,Cheng Tang,Boxuan Ma,Yuncheng Jiang,Daisuke Deguchi,Takayoshi Yamashita,Atsushi Shimada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Capture-Calibrate-Coach（3C）框架，通过构建异构图、图神经网络校准与元认知模式分类，实现对学习者知识监控能力的建模与个性化反馈，显著提升感知状态预测性能与用户反馈质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自适应学习系统缺乏对学习者知识监控（即自我理解准确性）这一关键元认知维度的有效建模与支持。

Method: 提出3C框架：Capture阶段从开放性自我报告中抽取学习者感知知识状态并构建异构图；Calibrate阶段用异构图神经网络推断未显式提及概念的潜在感知状态；Coach阶段将学习者分为五类元认知模式并提供兼顾知识缺口与校准误差的个性化反馈。

Result: 在684名学生数据上，潜在感知状态预测AUC达85.21%，显著优于基线；47人用户研究表明反馈质量获积极评价，尤其认可关于知识缺口的具体反馈与可操作学习建议。

Conclusion: 3C框架推动AI学习支持向具备元认知能力的‘学习伙伴’演进，在促进知识增长的同时提升学习者的自我觉察能力。

Abstract: Effective learning support requires understanding not only what learners know but also how accurately they perceive their own understanding. This metacognitive dimension, known as knowledge monitoring, fundamentally influences self-regulated learning, yet this dimension remains underexplored in current systems. This paper introduces the Capture-Calibrate-Coach (3C) framework for adaptive learning support. The Capture phase extracts learners' perceived knowledge states from open-ended self-reports to construct a heterogeneous graph linking learners and knowledge concepts. The Calibrate phase applies a heterogeneous graph neural network to infer latent perceived states for concepts not explicitly mentioned, enabling systematic knowledge monitoring assessment. The Coach phase classifies learners into five metacognitive patterns and delivers personalized feedback addressing both knowledge gaps and calibration errors. Evaluation with 684 students demonstrates 85.21% AUC in predicting latent perceived states, significantly outperforming baseline methods. A user study with 47 participants shows positive reception of feedback quality, with participants particularly valuing concrete feedback on knowledge gaps and actionable study guidance. These findings advance AI-based learning support toward metacognitive teammates that foster accurate self-awareness while supporting knowledge growth.

</details>


### [620] [SeqRoute: Global Budget-Aware Sequential LLM Routing via Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25424)
*Zhongling Xu,Shunan Zheng,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SeqRoute 是一种面向多轮会话的 LLM 路由框架，将路由建模为带预算约束的有限步长 MDP，利用离线强化学习（CQL）和新提出的 Hindsight Budget Relabeling（HBR）技术学习资源预留策略，显著降低预算破产率并提升成本-质量权衡性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM路由方法将查询视为独立事件，忽视用户会话的时序性和全局计算预算约束，导致早期耗尽资源、后期复杂查询被迫降级（即‘预算破产’）。

Method: 将多轮路由建模为以剩余预算为状态变量的有限步长马尔可夫决策过程；采用保守Q学习（CQL）进行离线强化学习；提出‘回溯式预算重标定’（HBR）扩充训练数据；部署时使用动态λ-sweep机制实现零样本Pareto前沿调节。

Result: 在多个基准上，SeqRoute将运营成本降低6.0–73.5%，同时保持或提升响应质量；预算破产率压低至1%以下，在整个成本-质量Pareto前沿上严格优于行为克隆、预算感知启发式及静态基线。

Conclusion: SeqRoute通过显式建模会话时序与预算动态，首次将延迟满足能力引入LLM路由，为预算受限的大模型服务系统提供了可扩展、鲁棒且高效的调度范式。

Abstract: Existing LLM routing frameworks treat queries as independent events, neglecting the sequential nature of real-world user sessions constrained by global computational budgets. This mismatch inevitably leads to budget bankruptcy: myopic routing policies exhaust resources on early interactions, forcing subsequent and often more complex queries onto inadequate models. We introduce SeqRoute, a framework that formulates multi-turn routing as a finite-horizon Markov Decision Process and solves it via offline reinforcement learning. By incorporating the remaining budget into the state space and training with Conservative Q-Learning (CQL), SeqRoute learns delayed gratification to strategically preserve resources for high-stakes turns later in the session. To overcome data starvation, we propose Hindsight Budget Relabeling (HBR). This technique retrospectively simulates historical trajectories under diverse hypothetical budgets, expanding 10,000 raw sessions into 2.38 million transitions enriched with critical bankruptcy signals. At deployment, a dynamic $λ$-sweep mechanism enables zero-shot navigation of the cost-quality Pareto frontier without retraining. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SeqRoute reduces operational costs by 6.0-73.5% while maintaining or improving quality, and suppresses bankruptcy rates to under 1%, strictly dominating behavior cloning, budget-aware heuristics, and static baselines across the entire Pareto frontier.

</details>


### [621] [Rethinking Feature Alignment in Generalist Graph Anomaly Detection: A Relational Fingerprint-based Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25429)
*Yujing Liu,Yixin Liu,Yu Zheng,Alan Wee-Chung Liew,Xiaofeng Cao,Shirui Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于关系指纹（ReFi）的通用图异常检测方法ReFi-GAD，通过语义感知的关系指纹对齐异构原始特征，结合Transformer编码器与信噪比引导的精炼模块，提升跨图泛化能力，在14个数据集上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有通用图异常检测（GAD）方法依赖PCA等投影方式对齐异构特征，忽视语义信息，导致无法学习可迁移的语义知识，甚至出现负迁移。

Method: 提出关系指纹（ReFi），从上下文和结构双视角编码异常线索；构建基于ReFi的通用GAD模型，包含Transformer编码器提取域不变知识，以及SNR引导的精炼模块实现域自适应。

Result: 在14个数据集上的实验表明，ReFi-GAD显著优于当前最优方法。

Conclusion: 语义感知的关系指纹能有效提升GAD模型在未见图上的泛化能力，避免负迁移，为通用图学习提供了新思路。

Abstract: Generalist graph anomaly detection (GAD) aims to detect anomalies on unseen graphs without graph-specific retraining. Nevertheless, existing approaches primarily focus on aligning heterogeneous features across different data domains via PCA-based projection, which harmonizes feature dimensions ignores feature semantics. As a result, GAD models fail to learn transferable semantic knowledge, and even exhibit negative transfer on unseen graphs. To address this issue, we propose a Relational Fingerprint-based generalist GAD approach (ReFi-GAD for short), aligning heterogeneous raw features with a universal and semantics-aware Relational Fingerprint (ReFi) that encodes anomaly-indicative cues from both contextual and structural perspectives. Building on ReFi, we design a fingerprint-grounded generalist GAD model, which combines a transformer-based encoder to capture domain-invariant knowledge with an SNR-guided refinement module for domain-specific adaptation. Extensive experiments on 14 datasets demonstrate that ReFi-GAD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [622] [Missing Pattern Recognized Diffusion Imputation Model for Missing Not At Random](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25439)
*Gyuwon Sim,Sumin Lee,Heesun Bae,Byeonghu Na,Doyun Kwon,Ju-Hee Hwang,Jae-Young Lim,Il-Chul Moon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为PRDIM的新型扩散插补模型，通过EM算法联合建模观测值与缺失掩码的分布，并引入模式识别器显式捕捉MNAR缺失模式，从而提升插补准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中缺失数据常为Missing Not at Random（MNAR），即缺失机制依赖于未观测到的真实值，传统方法难以有效处理。

Method: 提出Missing Pattern Recognized Diffusion Imputation Model（PRDIM），在EM框架下迭代最大化观测值与缺失掩码的联合似然；引入‘模式识别器’近似潜在缺失模式，指导扩散过程生成更符合缺失机制的插补结果。

Result: 在多种数据模态（如时间序列、图像）的MNAR设定下，PRDIM在广泛实验中持续展现出优异的插补性能。

Conclusion: PRDIM通过显式建模缺失模式与观测数据的联合分布，为MNAR场景下的缺失数据插补提供了有效且通用的新范式。

Abstract: Missing data frequently arises across diverse domains, including time-series and image domains. In the real world, missing occurrences often depend on the unobservable values themselves, which are referred to as Missing Not at Random (MNAR). In this work, we introduce the Missing Pattern Recognized Diffusion Imputation Model (PRDIM), a novel framework that explicitly captures the missing pattern and precisely imputes unobserved values. PRDIM iteratively maximizes the likelihood of the joint distribution for observed values and missing mask under an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm. In this sense, we first employ a pattern recognizer, which approximates the underlying missing pattern and provides guidance during every inference toward more plausible imputations with respect to the missing information. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that PRDIM consistently achieves strong imputation performance under MNAR settings across multiple data modalities.

</details>


### [623] [BigMac: Breaking the Pareto Frontier of Compute and Memory in Multimodal LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25451)
*Zili Zhang,Chengxu Yang,Shenglong Zhang,Chenyu Wang,Yufan Zhang,Tuo Dai,Zhouyang Li,Yuhong Ge,Chao Jin,Xin Jin,Yuliang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BigMac提出了一种新的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）训练流水线，通过将编码器和生成器计算嵌套进原始LLM流水线中，实现了计算与内存效率的同时优化，突破了二者之间的帕累托权衡边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM训练系统受限于计算效率与内存使用之间的帕累托前沿，难以同时优化两者；且面临模型与数据异构性挑战。

Method: 提出BigMac训练流水线，核心是将编码器和生成器计算‘依赖安全地’嵌套进原始LLM流水线，从而将编码器和生成器的激活内存复杂度降至O(1)，而LLM部分保持不变，并实现理想无限内存下的计算效率。

Result: 在多个MLLM和训练任务上验证，BigMac相比基线系统获得1.08×–1.9×训练加速，且批大小增加时内存占用稳定。

Conclusion: BigMac成功打破了MLLM训练中计算效率与内存使用的帕累托权衡，为高效、可扩展的多模态大模型训练提供了新范式。

Abstract: Training multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is challenged by both model and data heterogeneity. Existing systems redesign the training pipeline to address these challenges, but remain bound by a Pareto frontier between compute and memory efficiency, improving one only at the expense of the other. We present BigMac, a new training pipeline for multimodal LLMs. The core idea of BigMac is to elegantly nest the encoder and generator computation into the original LLM pipeline, forming a dependency-safe nested pipeline structure. With this design, BigMac reduces the activation memory complexity of the encoder and generator to O(1) while keeping the activation memory complexity of the LLM unchanged. At the same time, it achieves the same computational efficiency as the idealized setting with unlimited memory. As a result, BigMac breaks the Pareto frontier between computational efficiency and memory usage, enabling simultaneous optimization of both computation and memory in MLLM training. We evaluate BigMac on multiple MLLMs and training workloads. Experimental results show that BigMac achieves a 1.08$\times$-1.9$\times$ training speedup over baseline systems while maintaining stable memory usage as batch size increases.

</details>


### [624] [From Simulation to Enaction: Post-trained language models recognize and react to their own generations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25459)
*Asvin G.,Jack Lindsey*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了语言模型在后训练阶段如何识别自身生成的内容（即on-policy生成），发现后训练模型的输出分布熵显著低于非策略生成（off-policy），这种差异源于模型内部对输入意外性的表征，并影响输出不确定性；此外，模型能通过显式语言报告区分策略与非策略上下文，但显式与隐式识别机制不同。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型预训练时仅作为被动预测器，缺乏建模自身输出后果的动机；后训练使模型有机会利用其自身生成内容，从而可能发展出对on-policy状态的识别能力。

Method: 通过比较on-policy与off-policy生成下的输出分布熵，分析不同模型家族和规模的熵变化；引入‘输入意外性’（input surprise）作为内部表征变量，进行因果分析；设计开放提示与主题干扰prefill实验验证意图缓存效应；并采用显式语言报告任务检验模型对on-policy上下文的识别能力。

Result: 后训练模型on-policy输出熵比off-policy低3–4倍；该效应与内部‘输入意外性’表征相关且具因果性；开放提示下模型在首token前即降低话题不确定性，而主题不一致prefill会提升熵；模型能显式报告on-policy状态，但该能力依赖不同于隐式识别的机制。

Conclusion: 后训练赋予语言模型隐式识别自身on-policy生成的能力，该能力编码于输出分布熵中，并受输入意外性调控；显式与隐式识别机制分离，表明模型存在多路径元认知能力。

Abstract: Language models are pretrained as passive predictors with no incentive to model the consequences of their own outputs. Post-training changes this: a model producing its own responses can benefit from recognizing that it is on-policy. We present evidence that post-trained models recognize their on-policy generations, and this recognition is implicitly encoded in their output distributions. In particular, on-policy output distribution entropy is 3--4$\times$ lower than off-policy entropy, across model families and size classes. We trace part of this effect to an internal representation of input surprise, tracking the unlikeliness of the most recent input token according to the model's prior predictions, that causally modulates output entropy. One example of these phenomena can be observed in response to open-ended prompts; post-trained models (unlike pretrained models) collapse their uncertainty over the topic of their upcoming response before the first output token; violating this cached intention with a different-topic prefill results in higher output entropy. We also tested whether models can distinguish on-policy contexts from prefills via explicit verbal report. We find that they can, but that interestingly, this explicit recognition routes through a different mechanism than implicit recognition.

</details>


### [625] [LETS Forecast: Learning Embedology for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.06454)
*Abrar Majeedi,Viswanatha Reddy Gajjala,Satya Sai Srinath Namburi GNVV,Nada Magdi Elkordi,Yin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeepEDM 是一种结合非线性动力系统建模与深度神经网络的时间序列预测框架，基于Takens定理和经验动态建模（EDM），通过时延嵌入学习潜在空间，并用核回归近似动力学，显著提升预测精度与抗噪能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习时间序列预测方法大多未显式建模底层非线性动力学，而理解真实世界时间序列的动力学对精准预测至关重要。

Method: 提出 DeepEDM 框架：基于 Takens 定理构建时延嵌入，学习低维潜在空间；采用核回归近似动力学演化；融合 softmax 注意力机制实现高效、准确的多步预测。

Result: 在合成非线性动力系统数据和多领域真实时间序列上实验表明，DeepEDM 抗噪性强，预测精度优于当前最优方法。
