### [663] [Merge-Bench: Resolve Merge Conflicts with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25890)
*Benedikt Schesch,Michael D. Ernst*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LLMergeJ，一种基于Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）在线强化学习方法训练的大语言模型，用于解决Java程序中的合并冲突。作者构建了包含7938个真实世界合并冲突块的Merge-Bench数据集，并在Java及其他11种编程语言上评估了多个大模型的性能，结果显示当前最佳模型正确率仍低于60%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 版本控制合并是一项困难且重要的任务，现有方法在解决真实世界合并冲突方面效果有限，亟需更高效、可扩展的自动化解决方案。

Method: 构建无需人工标注、可扩展的Merge-Bench数据集；采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）在线强化学习方法训练14B参数的大型语言模型LLMergeJ，专用于Java合并冲突解决。

Result: LLMergeJ在Java合并冲突解决任务上优于三个商用大模型，仅略逊于Gemini 2.5 Pro；跨11种编程语言测试显示商用大模型性能较稳定，但所有模型最高正确率仍低于60%。

Conclusion: 尽管大语言模型在合并冲突解决任务中展现出潜力，但当前性能仍不足够可靠；LLMergeJ验证了强化学习微调路径的有效性，为后续研究提供了高质量基准数据集与可行技术路线。

Abstract: This paper applies machine learning to the difficult and important task of version control merging. (1) We constructed a dataset, Merge-Bench, of 7938 real-world merge conflict hunks from 1439 GitHub repositories. The ground truth is the merge resolution that developers committed to the repository. Our dataset construction methodology is scalable to arbitrary amounts of data since no manual labeling is required. (2) We trained a model, LLMergeJ, to resolve merge conflicts in Java programs. Our approach uses Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), an online reinforcement learning method, to train a Large Language Model (LLM). (3) We performed two evaluations of the performance of LLMs on resolving merge conflicts. On Java programs, LLMergeJ with 14B parameters outperforms 3 commercial LLMs, trailing only Gemini 2.5 Pro. Across 11 programming languages, commercial LLM performance is largely stable from language to language. The best models correctly resolve less than 60% of merge conflicts.

</details>


### [664] [Predicting Stock Price Direction on Earnings Announcement Days using Multi-modal Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25894)
*Manuel Noseda,Nathan Soldati,Marco Paina*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了利用财报发布前的新闻情绪、公司基本面和近期市场动态来预测财报日股价方向变动的有效性，构建了包含15个基本面指标、3个技术指标和FinBERT提取的情绪得分的多模态特征空间，并对比了LSTM、Transformer和逻辑回归模型，发现Transformer在识别剧烈波动方面表现更优，且加入新闻情绪特征能持续提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预测财报发布日的股价变动具有挑战性，主要由于市场噪声和高冲击性的价格不连续性。

Method: 构建融合基本面、技术指标和FinBERT情绪得分的多模态特征空间，对比LSTM、Transformer和逻辑回归模型，并进行含/不含情绪特征的消融实验。

Result: Transformer模型在识别剧烈价格波动方面敏感性更高，宏观F1分数优于LSTM；LSTM则表现出更高的精度但策略偏保守；加入新闻情绪特征对所有模型均有持续正向贡献。

Conclusion: 多模态特征（尤其含新闻情绪）可有效提升财报日股价方向预测性能，Transformer架构更适合捕捉高波动场景。

Abstract: Predicting stock price movements during Earnings Announcements (EAs) is a significant challenge due to market noise and high-impact price discontinuities. In this study, we evaluate whether pre-announcement news sentiment, firm fundamentals, and recent market dynamics jointly predict the directional price movement of equities on EA days. We construct a multi-modal feature space combining 15 fundamental metrics, 3 price-based technical indicators and sentiment scores derived from financial news articles processed using FinBERT. We compare a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network and a Transformer-based architecture against a logistic regression baseline, and further assess all models with and without sentiment features to quantify their incremental value. Our results indicate that while the LSTM demonstrates higher precision through a conservative safe-bet strategy, the Transformer model exhibits superior sensitivity in identifying volatile movements, achieving a higher macro F1-score, with ablation experiments showing a consistent benefit from incorporating news sentiment.

</details>


### [665] [Reading the Finetuning Prior: Verbatim Content Recovery via Contrastive Decoding Diffing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25902)
*Michał Brzozowski,Zuzanna Dubanowska,Enrico Cassano,Neo Christopher Chung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Contrastive Decoding Diffing (CDD)方法，仅通过对比微调模型与基座模型在输出层logit分布上的差异，无需访问模型权重或内部激活，即可高精度恢复被植入的事实性内容，并发现数据生成器引入的意外人工痕迹，展现出优于白盒方法ADL的性能与实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法如ADL虽能揭示微调领域信息，但需白盒访问模型内部，且只能给出模糊的领域描述；而实际部署中常无法获取模型权重或训练数据，亟需一种轻量、通用、黑/灰盒可用的模型审计技术。

Method: CDD包含三项核心设计：（1）绕过聊天模板以暴露原始微调先验；（2）使用极度模糊的前缀（pre-fill）启动生成；（3）在每步解码中放大微调模型与基座模型在logit空间的差异。全程仅依赖输出logits，无权重访问、无层选择、无模型特调。

Result: CDD在四种架构（1B–32B参数）上以单一默认配置，准确恢复植入的具体事实（如药物名、票数、物理测量值等），性能全面超越ADL且速度快约170倍；首次实现从数据生成器模式坍塌→模型权重污染→CDD提取的端到端指纹追踪；在真实微调场景下，单数据集恢复率近100%，混合数据集可准确识别全部四个来源。

Conclusion: CDD作为一种高效、通用、低访问要求的灰盒模型差分方法，在事实恢复与数据溯源方面显著优于现有白盒方案，为AI系统的透明性与问责制提供了切实可行的技术支撑。

Abstract: Narrowly finetuned language models memorize implanted content verbatim, but auditing what a deployed model has been taught, without access to its weights or training data, remains an open challenge. Recent work shows that activation differences between base and finetuned models carry readable traces of the finetuning domain; the state-of-the-art Activation Difference Lens (ADL) recovers a vague domain-level description but requires full "white-box" access to model internals. We introduce Contrastive Decoding Diffing (CDD), a model diffing method that operates on output-level logit distributions only, with no weight access, no layer selection, and no per-model tuning, yet recovers implanted facts. CDD consists of three ideas: bypassing the chat template to expose the raw finetuning prior, seeding generation with maximally vague pre-fills, and amplifying the logit-space difference between finetuned and base models at each decoding step. A single default configuration recovers implanted facts verbatim -- exact drug names, vote counts, physical measurements, and procedural details -- across four architectures (1B--32B parameters), uniformly outperforming ADL despite less access and running ~170x faster. Furthermore, CDD surfaces unintended data pipeline artifacts: a fictional persona introduced by the LLM data generator via mode collapse leaked into model weights and was extracted by CDD, constituting to our knowledge the first demonstrated end-to-end fingerprinting chain from data generator artifact to model weights to recovered output. We validate on real-domain finetuning settings, achieving near-perfect recovery across all single-dataset non-CoT variants and correctly identifying all four datasets in the mixed-dataset setting. CDD's success as a grey-box method outperforming white-box baselines underscores its practical utility for transparency and accountability in AI systems.

</details>


### [666] [Mapping the Schedule x Bit-Width Boundary in Sub-100M Quantisation-Aware Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25966)
*Christian Brandt Thomassen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实验验证了在子1亿参数解码器语言模型的量化感知训练（QAT）中，最优学习率warmdown比例（33%）与量化位宽（FP16/INT8/INT6/INT4）和模型规模的关系，并发现INT6与高精度训练共享相同最优调度，而INT4在≥50M时明确偏好wd33，<50M时无显著调度偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究从初始化开始的量化感知训练（QAT）中，最优学习率调度（特别是warmdown比例）是否依赖于量化位宽，尤其关注低比特（如INT6、INT4）是否需要不同于FP16/INT8的专用调度策略。

Method: 采用两阶段大规模因子实验：Phase 2（720次运行）系统扫描bit-width、warmdown fraction、LR magnitude、model size和seed；Phase 5（625次运行）多轴验证null假设，涵盖优化器、学习率曲线形状、训练长度、更大模型尺寸范围及INT4专项扫描；辅以weight-to-grid-distance分析检验权重收敛机制。

Result: FP16/INT8/INT6在所有测试规模下均一致最优warmdown为33%，推翻‘INT6需不同调度’的原假设；INT4在≥50M时wd33显著最优（z~12–15），<50M时无统计显著偏好；INT6性能下降服从log-linear规律，且Phase 2拟合可准确预测Phase 5的5个新尺寸；grid-distance分析显示INT6权重初期离格距离与FP16相近（比值~1.04），否定快速格点吸附机制。

Conclusion: 在子1亿参数模型上，FP16/INT8/INT6 QAT可复用同一学习率调度（wd33），无需按位宽调优；INT4则存在规模依赖的调度相变：≥50M应固定用wd33，<50M时调度选择无实质影响，属噪声主导区域；该结论对高效低比特语言模型训练具有直接实用指导意义。

Abstract: We test whether the optimal learning-rate schedule depends on bit-width during from-initialisation quantisation-aware training (QAT) for sub-100M decoder language models. A 720-run factorial grid (Phase 2) over bit-width x warmdown fraction x LR magnitude x model size x seed (FP16/INT8/INT6, 15M-100M, 5 seeds) finds the optimal warmdown is 33% at every (bit-width, size) cell. The primary hypothesis -- that INT6 QAT requires a different schedule than higher-precision training -- is falsified at FP16/INT8/INT6. A 625-run follow-up (Phase 5) probes the null along five axes: optimiser (AdamW), schedule shape (cosine), training length (up to 9x more iterations), an extended size sweep (5M-350M), and an INT4 sweep from 3M to 100M. The null is robust under all three setup changes. The INT6 penalty follows a log-linear scaling law whose fit on Phase 2 predicts the five held-out Phase 5 sizes (5M, 8M, 175M, 250M, 350M) within their 95% prediction intervals (5/5). For INT4 the picture is sharper than the higher precisions: at 50M and 100M, wd33 is decisively optimal (paired z ~ 12-15, 10/10 seeds); below 50M, across the six tested sizes from 3M to 30M, no individual size shows a statistically significant schedule preference and the per-size mean penalty oscillates within seed-level noise. The boundary is therefore a transition between a noise-dominated regime below 50M and a decisive wd33 regime at and above 50M, not a clean wd10 region. A weight-to-grid-distance probe falsifies the simplest mechanism for the FP16/INT8/INT6 null result (rapid grid-snapping): pre-warmdown, INT6-QAT weights sit at essentially the same distance from the INT6 grid as FP16 weights (ratio ~ 1.04). Practical recommendation: at sub-100M scale, tune the LR schedule once at FP16 and apply unchanged to INT8/INT6 QAT; for INT4 at 50M+ use wd33; for INT4 below 50M the schedule choice is in the noise.

</details>


### [667] [Joint Optimization of Training and Inference in Federated Edge Learning via Constrained Multi-Objective Deep Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25916)
*Zhen Li,Jun Cai,Chao Yang,Haoran Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向资源受限边缘设备的在线联合优化框架，用于协同管理联邦训练与推理，通过队列启发的转换机制和考虑数据/模型新鲜度的精度建模，构建多目标优化问题，并设计C-MOPPO算法求解，在精度、时延和能耗间实现优异权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上，如何协同优化联邦学习训练与实时推理，同时兼顾数据隐私、模型/数据新鲜度及系统资源约束（时延、能耗）是一个关键挑战。

Method: 提出基于串联队列的训练-推理转换机制；将数据新鲜度和模型新鲜度纳入精度建模；构建多目标在线优化问题并转化为多目标马尔可夫决策过程（MOMDP）；设计约束型多目标近端策略优化（C-MOPPO）算法，通过偏好采样与约束策略优化扩展帕累托前沿。

Result: C-MOPPO在多种系统配置下显著优于基线方法，在推理精度、延迟和能耗三者间实现了更优、更密集的帕累托权衡。

Conclusion: 联合优化联邦训练与推理是实现高效边缘智能的关键路径；引入时间动态建模（新鲜度）和基于强化学习的多目标在线优化（C-MOPPO）能有效应对边缘环境下的复杂权衡挑战。

Abstract: Federated edge learning (FEEL) has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for achieving edge intelligence (EI) via enabling collaborative model training across edge devices while protecting data privacy. In this paper, we put forth an online optimization framework that jointly manages federated training and inference on resource-constrained edge devices. We introduce a tandem-queue-inspired conversion mechanism that bridges inference requests and training data, and further incorporate both data and model freshness into the accuracy formulation to capture temporal dynamics in real-world environments. To maximize inference accuracy while minimizing latency and energy consumption, the mode selections, communication, and computation resource allocations of edge devices are jointly optimized. We formulate this optimization as a multi-objective optimization problem, which is NP-hard and further complicated by the online setting. To address these challenges, we transform the problem into a multi-objective Markov decision process (MOMDP) and develop a \underline{c}onstrained \underline{m}ulti-\underline{o}bjective \underline{p}roximal \underline{p}olicy \underline{o}ptimization (C-MOPPO) algorithm. Specifically, C-MOPPO first learns a set of policies with different preferences across three objectives, then leverages constrained policy optimization to enrich the Pareto front and obtain high-quality, dense solutions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that C-MOPPO achieves well-balanced trade-offs among objectives and significantly outperforms baselines under various system configurations.

</details>


### [668] [Quantitative Evaluation of the Severity of Posttraumatic Stress Disorder through Transfer Learning from Specific Phobia Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25933)
*Nicolas Ricka,Gauthier Pellegrin,Denis A. Fompeyrine,Thomas Rohaly,Leah Enders,Heather Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出了一种基于多变量核密度估计（MKDE）的机器学习方法，利用心率（HR）和皮肤电反应（GSR）信号客观评估PTSD严重程度，在21名参与者中实现了86%的分类准确率和5.6的平均绝对误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PTSD临床评估依赖主观评价，存在耗时、昂贵及易受人为偏差影响等问题，亟需客观、低负担的生理指标评估方法。

Method: 采用多变量核密度估计（MKDE）构建机器学习模型；采集21名参与者的HR与GSR信号及PCL-M评分；利用公开恐蛛症数据集训练恐惧响应模型，并在军事相关数据上提取恐惧响应曲线中的PTSD预测特征。

Result: 模型PTSD状态分类准确率达86%（PCL-M阈值36），平均绝对误差（MAE）为5.6，PTSD严重程度量表估计的平均绝对百分比误差为17%。

Conclusion: 该算法有望提升PTSD严重程度评估与随访的客观性与便捷性，在筛查和随访场景中具有临床应用潜力。

Abstract: Posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD) is a prevalent and debilitating mental health condition with significant personal and societal impacts. Current clinical assessments of PTSD often rely on subjective evaluations, which can be time-consuming, costly, and prone to human bias. This study proposes a machine learning (ML) approach based on multivariate kernel density estimation (MKDE) technique for the objective evaluation of PTSD severity. We collected heart rate (HR) and galvanic skin response (GSR) signals as well as PTSD Checklist - Military Version (PCL-M) labels from 21 participants during an immersive simulation. A fear-response model was trained on a public arachnophobia dataset, and predictive features of PTSD were extracted from the fear-response curves estimated on the military dataset. The model achieved an accuracy of 86\% in classifying PTSD status, effectively distinguishing participants with and without PTSD (PCL-M threshold of 36). The average mean absolute error (MAE) of the models is 5.6, and it estimated a clinical PTSD severity scale with a mean absolute percentage error of 17\%. Our algorithm demonstrates promising potential for enhancing estimation of PTSD severity and followup by offering an objective and low-effort evaluation approach using physiology. These findings suggest clinical utility in both screening and follow-up settings.

</details>


### [669] [From Latent Space to Training Data: Explainable Specialization in Minimal MLPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25939)
*Enrique Alba,Ezequiel Lopez-Rubio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了训练偏差是否能使单隐层MLP中的隐藏神经元专业化，并提升基于原型的数据重建效果；实验表明，覆盖正则化（coverage regularization）能稳定降低重建误差并提高原型使用专业化比率，而重叠惩罚则会将原型中心推至训练输入凸包之外，导致退化平衡；因此提出设计原则：每个排斥性结构损失必须由相容的吸引子补偿，否则会破坏潜在几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究训练偏差能否促使单隐层MLP中隐藏神经元专业化，并提升基于原型的训练数据重建能力。

Method: 在宽度等于数据集大小的高斯激活MLP上，对比三种结构损失（覆盖性、分离性、低重叠性）与标准拟合基线；在均匀采样的一维数据集上进行480次受控实验，并通过τ扫描和原型位置可视化分析机制。

Result: 覆盖正则化始终获得最低平均重建误差并提升原型使用专业化比率；分离性正则化效果不一致；重叠惩罚系统性有害，因其使原型中心被推出训练输入的凸包，形成退化平衡。

Conclusion: 排斥性结构损失（如分离、低重叠）若无相容吸引子（如覆盖）补偿，将破坏潜在几何结构；因此，原型可恢复性感知训练需确保每种排斥力都配以对应吸引力。

Abstract: We here study whether training biases can make hidden neurons specialize in minimal one-hidden-layer MLPs, and whether such specialization improves prototype-based reconstruction of the training dataset from the learned weights. We consider Gaussianactivation MLPs of width equal to dataset size and compare three structural losses that respectively encourage coverage of the training samples, separation between neuron-induced prototypes, and low overlap of hidden responses, against the standard fitting baseline. Experiments on uniformly sampled one-dimensional datasets show a stable pattern from N = 3 to N = 100 across 480 controlled runs. Coverage regularization gives the lowest mean reconstruction error at every tested size and raises the prototype-usage specialization ratio relative to the standard baseline, while separation has mixed effects and overlap penalties are systematically harmful. We show that the harm is not an optimization failure: overlap-active approaches fit the data as well as overlap-free ones but route the optimizer to a degenerate equilibrium in which prototype centers are pushed outside the convex hull of the training inputs. Coverage cannot reward this expulsion and acts as an attractor: separation admits it only at large temperature and overlap admits it at the nominal hyperparameter choice. A direct τ-sweep on the separation-only mask and a prototype-position visualization at N = 100 confirm the mechanism. The findings yield a simple design principle for prototype-recoverability-aware training: every repulsive structural loss must be compensated by a compatible attractor, or it will collapse the latent geometry it was meant to refine.

</details>


### [670] [Retrieval-Augmented Detection of Potentially Abusive Clauses in Chilean Terms of Service](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26019)
*Christoffer Loeffler,Tomás Rey Pizarro,Daniel Ignacio Miranda Vásquez,Andrea Martínez Freile*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于自动检测和分类智利在线服务条款中潜在滥用条款的检索增强生成框架，并构建了包含100份合同、10,029个标注条款的智利滥用条款扩展语料库，实验表明该方法显著提升了本地运行的中等规模开源语言模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智利在线服务条款常为格式合同，存在消费者易受滥用条款侵害的风险；而现行法律评估困难，因部分条款明显违法，其余则需依据诚信原则与合同失衡等宽泛标准判断。

Method: 提出一种面向本地部署的检索增强生成（RAG）框架，整合高效条款检测、混合稠密-稀疏检索、重排序与提示增强技术，适配中等规模开源语言模型；同时构建Chilean Abusive Terms of Service Extended语料库（100份合同，10,029个条款，24类法律标注）。

Result: 实验对比显示，检索增强提示显著提升性能，使本地开源模型在效果上接近大型云端模型，且计算与token开销更低；同时贡献了精细化法律标注体系与AI辅助合同审查的实用设计方案。

Conclusion: 该框架有效支持智利消费者保护场景下的本地化、低成本、高可信度条款审查，推动法律科技在发展中国家的应用落地。

Abstract: Online Terms of Service often function as contracts of adhesion, creating asymmetries that may expose consumers to potentially abusive clauses. In Chile, assessing such clauses is legally challenging because some provisions clearly violate mandatory consumer law, whereas others depend on broader standards such as good faith and contractual imbalance. We present a retrieval-augmented generation framework for the automated detection and classification of potentially abusive clauses in Chilean Terms of Service. Designed for local execution, it combines efficient clause detection, hybrid dense--sparse retrieval, reranking, and prompt augmentation to support medium-sized open-weight language models. We also introduce the Chilean Abusive Terms of Service Extended corpus, comprising 100 contracts and 10,029 annotated clauses in 24 legally grounded categories spanning illegal, dark, and gray clauses. Experiments comparing commercial and open-weight language models, fine-tuned encoders, and traditional baselines show that retrieval-augmented prompting substantially improves performance and enables local models to approach larger cloud-based systems at lower computational and token cost. The study also contributes a refined legal annotation scheme and a practical design for AI-assisted consumer contract review.

</details>


### [671] [STaT: Resolving Shape Distortion in Non-Stationary Time Series via Tri-Modal Synergy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25943)
*Hui Cheng,Jinsheng Guo,Zhenhao Weng,Yan Qiao,Meng Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出STaT多模态架构，融合符号、时序和文本三种模态，以提升时间序列预测的准确性与形状保真度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态时间序列预测方法过于关注平均误差最小化，导致预测结果过于平滑，忽略关键波动。

Method: STaT架构整合符号模态（将连续序列离散化以识别结构模式和拐点）、时序模态（提取序列依赖）和文本模态（利用领域语义引导宏观趋势）。

Result: 在八个真实世界基准上验证，STaT在传统幅度指标上提升最高达8.9%，同时形状失真降低最高达8.5%。

Conclusion: STaT通过三模态协同对齐，有效兼顾预测精度与形状保真，解决了平滑过度问题，为非平稳环境下的多模态预测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Recent research in time series forecasting frequently investigates the integration of textual and visual modalities with numerical models to better navigate non-stationary environments. Despite delivering solid numerical results, existing multi-modal approaches usually encounter a dilemma: prioritizing the minimization of average errors can result in excessively smooth forecasts that overlook essential fluctuations. To resolve this limitation, we introduce STaT, an innovative multimodal architecture for Symbolic-Temporal-Textual Alignment, which seamlessly unites three synergistic modalities. Specifically, the symbolic modality converts continuous time series into discrete tokens, facilitating the accurate identification of structural patterns and turning points; the temporal modality extracts inherent sequential dependencies; and the textual modality leverages domain semantics to steer the macroscopic forecasting trends. Comprehensive evaluations on eight real-world benchmarks indicate that STaT delivers exceptional performance, enhancing conventional magnitude indicators by up to 8.9% while simultaneously decreasing shape distortion by up to 8.5%.

</details>


### [672] [Small Models, Strong Priors: Architectural Inductive Bias for Parameter-Efficient Neural PDE Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25949)
*Shyam Sankaran,Hanwen Wang,Paris Perdikaris*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WaveLiT模型，通过引入小波变换、线性注意力机制和多尺度特征金字塔等结构先验，在参数量仅1-10M的情况下，性能媲美百亿参数的基础模型，验证了结构归纳偏置比单纯扩大模型规模更有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经PDE求解器盲目追随大模型路线，但作者认为在该领域，结构先验（如多尺度、小波表示）比单纯扩大参数规模更具效率和物理意义。

Method: 提出WaveLiT架构：结合离散小波变换实现无损多分辨率token化、增强型线性注意力块、共享权重的多尺度特征金字塔，以及小波域辅助损失函数。

Result: 1-10M参数的WaveLiT在8个TheWell基准上媲美100–1000倍参数的基础模型；尤其在波动/声学主导任务中优势显著；联合训练的10M参数版本展现出物理可解释的迁移模式；整套流程可在单GPU上训练。

Conclusion: 小模型PDE求解性能主要由架构归纳偏置决定而非规模；先验失败的模式本身揭示其建模内容，是评估归纳偏置的重要经验信号。

Abstract: Neural PDE solvers have followed the scaling trajectory of vision and language, with recent foundation models reaching billions of parameters. We argue that scale is a poor substitute for architectural inductive bias in this domain: structured priors deliver outsized parameter efficiency, and the pattern of where they succeed and fail is itself informative about what they capture. We instantiate this argument in WaveLiT, an architecture combining a discrete wavelet transform for lossless multi-resolution tokenization, an augmented linear attention block, a shared-weight multiscale feature pyramid, and a wavelet-domain auxiliary loss. Bespoke 1-10M-parameter WaveLiT models compete with foundation models of 100-1000$\times$ their size across eight TheWell benchmarks, with the largest gains on wave and acoustic-dominated benchmarks where the wavelet-multiscale prior fits the dominant dynamical structure and small per-step errors do not compound geometrically under rollout. Trained jointly across all eight benchmarks, a 10M-parameter foundation variant exhibits a structured, physically interpretable transfer pattern -- strongest where the wavelet-multiscale prior matches the dynamics, weakest on chaotic advection-dominated flows. The entire pipeline trains on a single GPU. The results suggest that small-model PDE performance is shaped by architectural inductive bias rather than scale, and that the structure of a prior's failures is a useful empirical signal about its content.

</details>


### [673] [Prism: A Plug-in Reproducible Infrastructure for Scalable Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26110)
*Jun-Tao Tang,Yu-Cheng Shi,Zhen-Hao Xie,Da-Wei Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Prism，一个专为多模态持续指令调优（MCIT）研究设计的可插拔、可复现代码库，通过轻量级插件注册机制解耦算法开发与模型主干实现，显著降低工程开销并提升方法复用性与公平比较能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中MLLM需持续适应新任务，但现有MCIT方法因直接修改基础模型代码导致工程负担重、架构碎片化、难以复现和公平比较。

Method: 提出Prism框架，采用插件注册机制将算法开发与底层MLLM主干解耦，支持即插即用的新策略集成，并原生兼容大规模训练流水线。

Result: Prism显著降低MCIT方法的实现门槛，提升代码复用性与实验可复现性，支持高效、可扩展的MCIT研究。

Conclusion: Prism为MCIT领域提供了标准化、模块化的基础设施，推动该方向向更高效、可复现和协作式的研究范式演进。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve versatility by reformulating diverse tasks into a unified instruction-following framework via instruction tuning. However, real-world deployment requires continuous adaptation to emerging tasks, motivating Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT). Despite its growing importance, current MCIT research is hindered by severe engineering bottlenecks. Existing methods are typically implemented by directly modifying the base MLLM codebase, which imposes substantial implementation overhead and yields method-specific architectures that severely limit code reuse and fair comparison. To address this, we introduce Prism, a plug-in reproducible codebase specifically designed for scalable MCIT research. It separates algorithmic development from the backbone implementation via a lightweight plugin registration mechanism, enabling new strategies to be integrated as independent plugins without modifying the underlying MLLM codebase, thereby eliminating structural fragmentation and accelerating method development. Prism natively supports widely used large-scale training pipeline, thereby enabling reproducible and scalable MCIT experimentation. Code is available at https://github.com/LAMDA-CL/Prism.

</details>


### [674] [Step-TP: A Grounded, Step-Level Dataset with Chain-of-Thought Reasoning for LLM-Guided Tensor Program Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25954)
*Mengfan Liu,Da Zheng,Junwei Su,Chuan Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Step-TP数据集，为LLM提供可验证、原子化、步骤级的结构化思维链监督，以提升张量程序优化中单步决策的可靠性与可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM引导的张量程序优化方法缺乏可验证的步骤级监督和可解释性，导致模型在大规模组合优化空间中难以做出可靠的单步决策。

Method: 构建Step-TP后训练数据集，基于四个设计原则：(i) 高效可验证的中间表示（IR）；(ii) 原子化、可组合的优化策略；(iii) 结构化思维链监督与显式IR状态转移；(iv) 策略过滤以平衡覆盖与防捷径。

Result: Step-TP实现了闭环的中间程序状态推理，支持可靠多步优化而非仅结果模仿，并开源数据集与实现。

Conclusion: Step-TP通过步骤级、结构化、可验证的监督显著提升了LLM在张量程序优化任务中的决策可靠性与可解释性。

Abstract: Despite the strong reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), optimizing the execution efficiency of tensor programs remains challenging due to the need for precise, composable transformation decisions. Recent LLM-guided approaches frame tensor program optimization as an iterative decision process, but existing datasets provide only end-to-end optimized program pairs using token-inefficient representations, lacking verifiable step-level supervision and interpretability. As a result, LLMs struggle to make reliable single-step decisions in large combinatorial optimization spaces. We introduce Step-TP, a post-training dataset for tensor program optimization that provides grounded, atomic, step-level supervision with structured chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. Step-TP forms a closed reasoning loop over intermediate program states, enabling reliable multi-step optimization rather than outcome imitation. Its design is guided by four principles: (i) a token-efficient, verifiable intermediate representation (IR) that deterministically lowers to TVM TIR; (ii) atomic and composable optimization strategies that decompose complex trajectories into interpretable single-step decisions; (iii) structured CoT supervision coupled with explicit IR-to-IR state transitions; and (iv) strategy filtering to balance coverage while preventing shortcut exploitation. The dataset and implementation are available at a GitHub link, https://github.com/LIUMENGFAN-gif/StepTP.

</details>


### [675] [Hidden in Plain Tokens: Simply Robust, Gradient-Free Watermark for Synthetic Audio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25967)
*Georgios Milis,Yubin Qin,Yihan Wu,Heng Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需梯度、无需微调的音频水印方法，利用离散表示学习中的词表冗余性，通过社区检测减少词汇量以提升水印鲁棒性和可检测性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自回归模型的推理时水印方法在连续模态（如音频）上因离散化不一致而不适用；而依赖微调分词器的方法丧失了训练无关的优势。作者受离散化中词汇冗余性的启发，寻求一种无需训练、更鲁棒的音频水印方案。

Method: 基于离散化词汇冗余性，提出一种梯度无关、无需微调的音频水印方法；理论分析词元错误对水印检测的影响，并利用社区检测构建精简词表以缓解该问题。

Result: 实验表明该方法将水印可检测性提升数个数量级，并具备对音频修改（如压缩、重采样等）的内生鲁棒性；在多媒体token级水印任务中达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: 离散表示学习本身的特性（如词汇冗余）可被直接用于设计高效、鲁棒、免训练的水印机制，为生成式AI内容溯源提供了新范式。

Abstract: As policy catches up with the capabilities of generative AI, watermarking is central to content provenance efforts. Inference-time watermarks for autoregressive models are unfit for continuous modalities due to discretization inconsistencies. Existing methods overcome this by finetuning the modality tokenizers, nullifying the watermark's training-free advantage. In this work, motivated by the vocabulary redundancy of discretization, we propose an elegant solution for powerful and robust watermarking of synthetic audio. We theoretically analyze the impact of token errors on watermark detection, and effectively mitigate them using a reduced vocabulary obtained via community detection. Thorough experiments showcase that our gradient-free method can boost detectability by several orders of magnitude, while also achieving built-in robustness to audio modifications. Broadly, we discover a new state-of-the-art for token-level watermarks in multimedia, which simply arises from the nature of discrete representation learning.

</details>


### [676] [Fuzzy PyTorch: Rapid Numerical Variability Evaluation for Deep Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25991)
*Inés Gonzalez-Pepe,Hiba Akhaddar,Tristan Glatard,Yohan Chatelain*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Fuzzy PyTorch 是一个集成随机算术到 PyTorch 的框架，用于高效、可扩展地评估深度学习模型中的浮点数值变异性，支持概率舍入与新型上下舍入模式，在保持模型性能的同时实现比 Verrou 快 5–60 倍的运行速度，并可扩展至 3.41 亿参数模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着深度学习在多样化任务中广泛应用，理解浮点运算带来的数值变异性对保障模型鲁棒性与可靠性至关重要；现有工具需兼顾可扩展性、效率及与主流框架（如PyTorch）的无缝集成，同时最小化代码修改。

Method: 提出 Probabilistic Rounding with Instruction Set Management（PRISM）库，通过对接 Verificarlo 编译器，在 PyTorch 中嵌入随机算术支持，引入概率舍入与新型‘上-下’舍入模式。

Result: 相比当前最优工具 Verrou，Fuzzy PyTorch 实现 5x–60x 的运行时加速；成功在参数量从1M到341M的多种模型上验证其可扩展性；模型精度基本不受影响。

Conclusion: Fuzzy PyTorch 提供了一种高效、可扩展且实用的方案，使研究者和工程师能在不牺牲性能与计算效率的前提下，量化并管理深度学习中的浮点不确定性。

Abstract: We introduce Fuzzy PyTorch, a framework for rapid evaluation of numerical variability in deep learning (DL) models. As DL is increasingly applied to diverse tasks, understanding variability from floating-point arithmetic is essential to ensure robust and reliable performance. Tools assessing such variability must be scalable, efficient, and integrate seamlessly with existing frameworks while minimizing code modifications. Fuzzy PyTorch enables this by integrating stochastic arithmetic into PyTorch through Probabilistic Rounding with Instruction Set Management, a novel library interfacing with Verificarlo, a numerical analysis compiler. The library offers stochastic rounding mode and a novel mode; up-down rounding. Comparative evaluations show Fuzzy PyTorch maintains model performance and achieves runtime reductions of 5x to 60x versus Verrou, a state-of-the-art tool. We further demonstrate scalability by running models from 1 to 341 million parameters, confirming applicability across small and large DL architectures. Overall, Fuzzy PyTorch provides an efficient, scalable, and practical solution for assessing numerical variability in deep learning, enabling researchers and practitioners to quantify and manage floating-point uncertainty without compromising performance or computational efficiency.

</details>


### [677] [Deployment-complete benchmarking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25997)
*El Mustapha Mansouri,Keigo Arai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出部署完备性基准测试（deployment-complete benchmarking），旨在评估基准测试结果是否足以支持实际部署决策，指出传统基准分数无法保证部署行动的合理性，并通过实证分析揭示多个主流基准（如Tox21、Matbench、JARVIS）存在严重不完备性；作者提出证据纤维、完成曲线等新概念，并验证certify-then-acquire策略可显著降低错误决策率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试仅提供分数，但分数本身不能确保其支持的部署行动是合理或可靠的；实践中，相同分数可能对应不同部署后果，亟需评估基准证据对实际部署决策的充分性。

Method: 引入部署完备性定义：基准对某主张完备，当且仅当所有产生相同证据（evidence fiber）的模型均导出相同部署动作；通过识别混合纤维（mixed fibers）暴露缺失的部署信息，用完成曲线量化消除歧义所需证据量；在控制响应空间中比较基准通道与真实部署通道的共形覆盖，结合公共审计与保留回放实验验证方法有效性。

Result: 在Tox21中97.9%的纤维为混合纤维，Matbench和JARVIS主审计中中位可认证比例为0；基准通道94.98%共形覆盖在未测部署通道下骤降至10.07%，而响应秩区间达94.91%；零基准误差下仅45.4%候选者可在最大残差下被认证；certify-then-acquire策略使Tox21错误决策率从1.19%降至0.027%，JARVIS从20.3%降至0.128%。

Conclusion: 部署就绪的基准不应只报告分数，而应报告证据、所支持的行动、剩余歧义及完备化成本；部署完备性是连接科学评估与现实部署的关键桥梁，需成为未来基准设计与评估的核心标准。

Abstract: Benchmarks increasingly guide deployment, procurement and scientific screening, yet a score supports only the response it records, not necessarily the deployment action. We introduce deployment-complete benchmarking, which tests whether benchmark evidence determines a deployment action. A benchmark is complete for a claim exactly when the action is constant on each evidence fiber; mixed fibers expose missing deployment information, and completion curves quantify the evidence required to resolve ambiguity. In controlled response spaces, benchmark-channel conformal coverage of 94.98% transferred poorly to an unmeasured deployment channel (10.07%), whereas response-rank intervals achieved 94.91% coverage; even zero benchmark error certified only 45.4% of candidates at the largest residual size. Public audits revealed incompleteness, including 97.9% mixed Tox21 fibers and zero median certifiable fraction in main Matbench and JARVIS audits. In held-out replays, certify-then-acquire reduced false decisions from 1.19% to 0.027% in Tox21 and from 20.3% to 0.128% in JARVIS, while changing model choice and identifying deployment-relevant probes. Deployment-ready benchmarks should report evidence, supported actions, ambiguity and completion cost rather than scores alone.

</details>


### [678] [Causal methods for LLM development and evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.25998)
*Dennis Frauen,Marie Brockschmidt,Konstantin Hess,Haorui Ma,Yuchen Ma,Abdurahman Maarouf,Maresa Schröder,Jonas Schweisthal,Yuxin Wang,Athiya Deviyani,Sonali Parbhoo,Rahul G. Krishnan,Stefan Feuerriegel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了因果方法在大语言模型（LLM）开发与评估中的潜在价值，指出当前经验驱动的LLM开发中因果问题普遍存在但因果方法应用不足；文章系统阐述了因果推断如何应对日志数据混杂、评估偏差和部署环境非平稳等挑战，并梳理了其在预训练、对齐、路由、智能体工作流和评估等全流程中的应用机会，最后提出若干未来研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM开发当前依赖大规模经验迭代，但其中许多核心问题（如数据域添加效应、提示路由决策、标注者偏好变化等）本质上是因果问题；而因果方法因能处理混杂、分布偏移和非平稳性，在该领域被严重低估和未充分利用。

Method: 采用综述与框架构建方法：首先论证LLM开发各环节（预训练、对齐、路由、评估等）中存在的因果结构与挑战；其次系统映射因果方法在全开发流程中的适用场景；最后提出面向LLM的因果学习新研究方向。

Result: 明确了因果推断可提升LLM开发的可靠性与科学性，特别是在处理混杂偏差、评估偏倚和动态部署环境方面；建立了因果视角下的LLM开发全流程分析框架，并识别出多个亟待探索的研究机会。

Conclusion: 因果方法虽尚未被广泛采用，但在LLM开发与评估中具有重要且尚未被充分挖掘的价值；将因果思维与技术系统性融入LLM生命周期，有助于实现更稳健、可解释、可复现的模型工程实践。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) development is currently driven by large-scale empirical iteration over data mixtures, reward models, routing strategies, and evaluation pipelines. Here, we argue that many central questions in LLM development and evaluation are inherently causal: What is the effect of adding a data domain during pretraining? How do annotator preferences change when LLMs generate text in a different style? Should a prompt be routed to a larger or smaller model given inference cost constraints? In general, causal methods are well-suited to such settings where interventions change outcomes but, surprisingly, are underrepresented in LLM development. Our contribution is threefold: (1) We explain how causal methods can help develop modern LLM development and evaluation: LLM development relies heavily on logged data, which are often subject to confounding and distribution shifts; evaluation uses learned but potentially biased judges; and deployment environments are non-stationary. These conditions make purely predictive approaches fragile and create opportunities for principled identification and estimation methods from causal inference. (2) We further map opportunities for causal methods in the entire LLM development pipeline, including pretraining, alignment, routing, agentic workflows, and evaluation. (3) We discuss new research opportunities around leveraging causal methods for LLM development and evaluation. Overall, we argue that causal methods are potentially underutilized for the LLM development and evaluation pipeline, despite the fact that such methods can ensure a reliable and scientifically grounded design.

</details>


### [679] [Learning in Low-Dimensional Subspaces: Orthogonal Bottlenecks for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26012)
*Aleksandar Todorov,Matthia Sabatelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种在深度强化学习中引入正交瓶颈（orthogonal bottleneck）的简单表示先验，通过固定正交投影将编码器特征约束到低维子空间，无需额外目标、预训练或算法修改；理论证明在满足线性可实现性假设下，当瓶颈维度超过最优值函数在特征空间中的本征秩时，表达能力得以保持且梯度动力学不变；实验表明该方法在单任务与多任务基准上能匹配甚至超越基线性能，并揭示了低维表示的有效性及与环境复杂度更强的相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习代理通常依赖高维神经表征，但越来越多证据表明任务相关的价值和策略结构本质上可能是低维的；因此，需要一种轻量、通用且无需额外开销的方式来引导表征学习朝向低维、任务相关结构。

Method: 在编码器后插入一个固定的正交投影（即正交瓶颈），将高维特征映射到低维子空间；该方法不引入辅助损失、不需预训练、不改变底层RL算法；理论分析基于线性可实现性假设，证明瓶颈在足够维数下保持表达力与梯度动态等价性。

Result: 实验显示：1）在多个单/多任务基准上，当瓶颈维数超过一个小的、任务相关的阈值时，性能匹配或优于基线；2）值表征可被极度压缩而不损失性能；3）最小充分维数更取决于环境复杂度而非编码器宽度；4）正交瓶颈能稳定特征范数并提升有效秩。

Conclusion: 正交瓶颈为强化学习中的表征学习提供了一种轻量、架构无关的机制，支持‘流形假设’的表征空间解释，并揭示了低维结构对RL性能的关键作用。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) agents commonly rely on high-dimensional neural representations, despite growing evidence that task-relevant value and policy structure may be intrinsically low-dimensional. In this work, we present a simple yet effective representation-level prior that inserts a fixed orthonormal projection to constrain encoder features to a low-dimensional subspace, requiring no auxiliary objectives, pretraining, or changes to the underlying RL algorithm. Under a linear realizability assumption, we prove that when the bottleneck dimension exceeds the intrinsic rank of the optimal value function in feature space, the bottleneck preserves expressivity and leaves the induced gradient dynamics unchanged up to an equivalent low-dimensional parameterization. Empirically, we find that across both single and multi-task benchmarks, baseline performance is either matched or improved once the bottleneck dimension exceeds a small task-dependent threshold; in many cases, value representations can be compressed to extremely low dimensions without loss, and the minimal sufficient dimension depends far more on environment complexity than encoder width. In addition, we analyze representation geometry and find that orthogonal bottlenecks stabilize feature norms and are associated with higher effective rank. Together, these results support a representation-space interpretation of the manifold hypothesis in reinforcement learning and position orthogonal bottlenecks as a lightweight, architecture-agnostic mechanism for shaping RL representations.

</details>


### [680] [AdvantageFlow: Advantage-Weighted Least Squares for RL in Flow Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26013)
*Branislav Kveton,Anup Rao,Subhojyoti Mukherjee,Krishna Kumar Singh,Viet Dac Lai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdvantageFlow是一种用于校正流模型的前向过程强化学习算法，通过优化优势加权的前向预测损失，并引入rollout策略正则化来稳定训练，在图像生成任务中优于Flow-GRPO等基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法如Flow-GRPO优化反向过程，而前向过程RL方法因负优势导致损失非凸、训练不稳定，亟需更稳定高效的前向RL算法。

Method: 提出AdvantageFlow算法，优化优势加权的前向过程预测损失，并引入rollout策略正则化以降低方差、稳定训练。

Result: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium上的图像生成任务中，AdvantageFlow性能优于Flow-GRPO及基于负感知微调的先进前向RL基线。

Conclusion: AdvantageFlow为校正流模型提供了一种更优的前向过程强化学习范式，兼具稳定性与性能提升。

Abstract: We introduce AdvantageFlow, a forward-process reinforcement learning algorithm for rectified flow models. Unlike Flow-GRPO, which optimizes the reverse process, we optimize an advantage-weighted forward-process prediction loss. This optimization problem is unstable when advantages are negative and the loss becomes non-convex. We stabilize it by rollout policy regularization, which reduces variance and arises from fitting a local reward-improving target distribution. We evaluate AdvantageFlow on image generation tasks with Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium. It outperforms both Flow-GRPO and a state-of-the-art forward-process RL baseline based on negative-aware fine-tuning.

</details>


### [681] [Length Generalization with Log-Depth Recurrent Units](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26035)
*Charles Pert,Dalal Alrajeh,Alessandra Russo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: The paper introduces MLP-LDRU, a log-depth recurrent unit based on associativity-biased parallel reduction, achieving strong length generalization on regular languages and competitive performance on broader sequence tasks.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Neural networks struggle with length generalization: RNNs suffer from positional biases, transformers are limited by fixed depth; regular languages serve as a clean testbed for evaluating generalization to unseen lengths.

Method: Proposes MLP-LDRU — a Log-Depth Recurrent Unit using parallel reduction to approximate recurrence, designed around associativity-biased operators; evaluated on 21 regular-language tasks (including new prefix languages), ListOps, and NLP classification benchmarks.

Result: MLP-LDRU achieves 100% out-of-distribution accuracy on 18/21 regular-language tasks and ≥99.9% on the rest; outperforms comparable recurrent and attention-based models; shows competitive performance on ListOps and NLP classification.

Conclusion: MLP-LDRU demonstrates that log-depth, associativity-aware architectures can significantly improve length generalization—especially for regular languages—offering a promising alternative to standard RNNs and transformers.

Abstract: Length generalization remains a persistent challenge for neural networks: recurrent models tend to suffer from positional biases, while transformers are constrained by fixed computational depth. Regular languages provide a frequently used testbed for evaluating length generalization, as label prediction can be checked for any sequence length. We propose MLP-LDRU, a type of Log-Depth Recurrent Unit, which captures a class of associativity-biased operators designed to approximate recurrence through parallel reduction. We evaluate MLP-LDRU on 21 regular-language tasks, consisting of standard benchmarks and new prefix languages, where it achieves 100% out-of-distribution accuracy on 18 tasks and at least 99.9% on the remaining 3 when increasing max training length, outperforming comparable recurrent and attention-based models. We further evaluate MLP-LDRU beyond regular languages on ListOps and NLP classification benchmarks, where it performs competitively.

</details>


### [682] [Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC) for Probabilistic Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26061)
*Waleed Razzaq,Yun-Bo Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为神经元随机注意力电路（NSAC）的新型连续时间注意力架构，通过Ornstein-Uhlenbeck随机微分方程建模注意力logits，并结合线虫神经回路策略（NCPs）实现生物启发式门控机制，从而在注意力权重中引入可解释的、基于高斯与logistic-normal分布的不确定性建模；该方法支持aleatoric与epistemic不确定性联合量化，在多项连续时间学习任务中兼具准确性、校准性与神经元级可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续时间表示学习，尤其是连续时间注意力架构中，对不确定性（特别是aleatoric与epistemic的区分与联合量化）的可靠建模仍处于初步阶段，缺乏生物可解释性与原理性随机性注入机制。

Method: 提出Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit（NSAC）：将注意力logits建模为输入依赖、非线性门控调制的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck SDE解，门控结构源自C.elegans神经回路策略（NCPs）；logits服从高斯分布，经softmax后注意力权重服从logistic-normal分布；采用含高斯负对数似然与epistemic分离正则项的双目标损失函数。

Result: 在不规则CT函数逼近、多变量回归、长程预测、工业4.0及自动驾驶车道保持五类任务中，NSAC在预测精度上媲美主流基线，同时输出良好校准的不确定性估计，并具备神经元细胞级别的可解释性。

Conclusion: NSAC为连续时间注意力提供了首个兼具原理性随机建模、不确定性分解能力与生物启发可解释性的框架，验证了将神经科学启发的电路机制融入概率深度学习的有效性与实用性。

Abstract: Reliable quantification of uncertainty estimates in continuous-time (CT) representation learning remains nascent, particularly within CT attention architectures. We introduce the Neuronal Stochastic Attention Circuit (NSAC), a novel biologically-inspired CT attention architecture that reformulates attention logit computation as the solution of an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck stochastic differential equation modulated by input-dependent, nonlinear interlinked gates derived from repurposed C.elegans Neuronal Circuit Policies (NCPs) wiring mechanism. It induces Gaussian distribution over logits that propagates principled stochasticity through logistic-normal distribution over attention weights to yield probabilistic output. A two-term objective function combining Gaussian negative log-likelihood with an epistemic-separation regularizer enforces higher predictive variance and enables joint quantification of aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. Empirically, we implement NSAC in a diverse set of learning tasks including: (i) irregular CT function approximation; (ii) multivariate regression; (iii) long-range forecasting; (iv) Industry 4.0; and (v) the lane-keeping of autonomous vehicles. We observe that the NSAC remains competitive against several baselines in terms of accuracy and produces reasonably well-calibrated uncertainty estimates while being interpretable at the neuronal cell level.

</details>


### [683] [Conditional KRR: Injecting Unpenalized Features into Kernel Methods with Applications to Kernel Thresholding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26067)
*Rustem Takhanov,Zhenisbek Assylbekov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了条件正定核（CPD）下的条件核岭回归（conditional KRR）方法，通过引入“残差核”将其统计行为归约为标准KRR，并证明了额外风险项为O(1/√N)；在主特征或随机特征设定下，当回归函数的F-分量占主导时，conditional KRR优于标准KRR。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 条件正定核（CPD）及其对应的条件核岭回归（conditional KRR）因可视为先进行基于F类函数的线性回归、再对残差应用标准KRR而具有理论和实用价值，但其统计性质尚待系统刻画。

Method: 将conditional KRR的行为通过构造“残差核”归约为标准KRR分析；理论分析聚焦于K正定时，F取为K Mercer分解前k个主特征或k个随机特征两种情形；辅以实验验证。

Result: 证明了conditional KRR的风险可由对应残差核的KRR风险加上一个O(1/√N)的附加项控制；在主特征与随机特征设定下二者密切相关；理论与实验均表明：当真实回归函数在F上的投影强于其残差部分时，conditional KRR显著优于标准KRR。

Conclusion: conditional KRR是一种有理论保证且在特定结构假设下更优的非参数回归方法；其性能优势依赖于目标函数在指定函数类F上的可解释性程度。

Abstract: Conditionally positive definite (CPD) kernels are defined with respect to a function class $\mathcal{F}$. It is well known that such a kernel $K$ is associated with its native space (defined analogously to an RKHS), which in turn gives rise to a learning method -- called conditional kernel ridge regression (conditional KRR) due to its analogy with KRR -- where the estimated regression function is penalized by the square of its native space norm. This method is of interest because it can be viewed as classical linear regression, with features specified by $\mathcal{F}$, followed by the application of standard KRR to the residual (unexplained) component of the target variable. Methods of this type have recently attracted increasing attention.
  We study the statistical properties of this method by reducing its behavior to that of KRR with another fixed kernel, called the residual kernel. Our main theoretical result shows that such a reduction is indeed possible, at the cost of an additional term in the expected test risk, bounded by $\mathcal{O}(1/\sqrt{N})$, where $N$ is the sample size and the hidden constant depends on the class $\mathcal{F}$ and the input distribution.
  This reduction enables us to analyze conditional KRR in the case where $K$ is positive definite and $\mathcal{F}$ is given by the first $k$ principal eigenfunctions in the Mercer decomposition of $K$. We also consider the setting where $\mathcal{F}$ consists of $k$ random features from a random feature representation of $K$. It turns out that these two settings are closely related. Both our theoretical analysis and experiments confirm that conditional KRR outperforms standard KRR in these cases whenever the $\mathcal{F}$-component of the regression function is more pronounced than the residual part.

</details>


### [684] [Rethinking Weak Supervision in Anomaly Detection: A Comprehensive Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26068)
*Xu Yao,Siyuan Zhou,Wu Zhenbo,Chaochuan Hou,Shuang Liang,Shiping wang,Hailiang Huang,Songqiao Han,Minqi Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个统一评估弱监督异常检测（WSAD）不同范式（不完全、不精确、不准确监督）的基准WSADBench，通过70万+实验揭示了四条关键发现，挑战现有研究方向的割裂性，并开源代码与数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有弱监督异常检测研究在不完全、不精确、不准确监督三个方向上彼此孤立，缺乏统一框架来判断它们是否解决独特问题或共享底层机制。

Method: 构建了首个统一基准WSADBench，系统性地在4种模态、36种算法上，通过调节标签数量、粒度和质量进行标准化评估；开展超70万次实验进行实证分析。

Result: 发现：(i) 三类弱监督场景存在强内在关联；(ii) 专用WSAD算法仅在极端标签稀缺时占优，监督增强或OOD下被基础模型/通用分类器超越；(iii) 无标签数据效用不稳定，标签精炼更有效；(iv) 模型对不同标签噪声类型敏感性不对称。

Conclusion: 弱监督异常检测各方向并非正交独立，需统一视角；tabular foundation models展现出更强泛化潜力；未来研究应更关注标签质量提升与噪声鲁棒性设计。

Abstract: Weakly supervised anomaly detection (WSAD) has developed in three primary directions: incomplete, inexact, and inaccurate supervision. However, these directions remain isolated, lacking a unified framework to assess whether they address unique challenges or share fundamental mechanics. This paper introduces WSADBench, the first benchmark that unifies evaluation across distinct weakly supervised scenarios, benchmarking diverse approaches from specialized WSAD methods to advanced tabular foundation models. WSADBench establishes standardized protocols to evaluate 36 algorithms across 4 modalities by systematically varying label quantity, granularity, and quality, revealing the performance boundaries of various methods. Based on over 700K experiments, WSADBench reveals four critical insights: (i) Strong intrinsic correlations exist between these weak supervision scenarios, challenging the isolation of current research directions. (ii) Specialized WSAD algorithms excel only in extreme label-scarcity regimes but are quickly dominated by tabular foundation models and general classification methods as supervision increases or in OOD scenarios. (iii) Unlabeled data shows inconsistent utility across settings, with marginal gains compared to label refinement. (iv) Models exhibit asymmetric sensitivity to different types of label noise. We release WSADBench as an open-source benchmark with code and datasets to facilitate future WSAD research: https://github.com/SUFE-AILAB/WSADBench.

</details>


### [685] [Active Query Synthesis for Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26072)
*Namrata Nadagouda,Nauman Ahad,Maegan Tucker,Mark A. Davenport*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向偏好学习的主动查询合成框架Info-Synth，通过互信息最大化在连续空间中生成最优查询，并引入置信度感知响应模型以应对模糊比较问题；同时设计了两种适配有限查询池的策略，验证于合成数据、文本摘要与机器人控制调参任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动学习方法计算开销大（依赖池式评估），且忽视用户对相似或差异极大物品对的反馈可靠性低的问题。

Method: 提出置信度感知响应模型；构建基于互信息最大化的主动查询合成框架Info-Synth（在连续空间中生成查询）；设计Pair M-dist和Pair Opt-dist两种策略以适配有限查询池。

Result: 在合成偏好学习、受约束的文本摘要数据集及仿真移动机器人控制器增益调优任务上验证了框架的有效性与通用性。

Conclusion: Info-Synth能显著提升偏好学习效率与鲁棒性，尤其在反馈不可靠和计算受限场景下具有优势。

Abstract: Efficient learning of user preferences is crucial for many modern decision making systems but typically requires costly labeled data. Active learning reduces this cost, yet standard methods are computationally expensive due to pool-based evaluation. Further, most methods assume all query feedback is equally reliable, ignoring that pairwise queries between nearly identical or entirely dissimilar items yield ambiguous, low-confidence responses. To address the issue of feedback reliability, we introduce a novel confidence aware response model that explicitly accounts for these ambiguous comparisons. To overcome the computational bottleneck of pool-based evaluation, we propose an active query synthesis framework, Info-Synth that generates optimal queries by maximizing a mutual information-based objective within a continuous space. Moreover, we propose two strategies, Pair M-dist and Pair Opt-dist, that extend Info-Synth to select effective queries even when restricted to finite query pools. We demonstrate our framework's versatility and performance across synthetic preference learning, constrained text summary datasets, and subjective, continuous-space controller gain tuning for a simulated mobile robot.

</details>


### [686] [Global Convergence of Wasserstein Policy Gradient for Entropy-Regularized Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26078)
*Zhaoyu Zhu,Rui Gao,Shuang Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Wasserstein策略梯度（WPG）在熵正则化强化学习中的全局收敛性理论，通过Bellman结构替代传统凸性分析，建立了分布式的Polyak–Łojasiewicz条件，并证明了其几何收缩性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: WPG虽在连续控制任务中表现优异，但其全局收敛性缺乏理论支撑；标准Langevin分析不适用，因其目标函数依赖Bellman递归而非静态凸泛函，且软Q函数的正则性需沿策略迭代进行控制。

Method: 利用熵正则化RL的Bellman结构，将凸性角色替换为Bellman论证：软Bellman残差具有关于Gibbs策略的状态级KL表示；Bellman压缩将其与全局最优差距关联；Bellman预解恒等式将值改进与相对Fisher信息联系起来；结合演化Gibbs族的均匀对数Sobolev不等式，导出分布式的Polyak–Łojasiewicz条件，并分析离散化误差。

Result: 建立了WPG的全局收敛理论，证明其满足分布式的Polyak–Łojasiewicz条件，获得带离散化偏差的几何收缩；揭示熵正则化RL虽非通常意义下的凸问题，但Bellman递归诱导出有利于全局收敛的PL型几何结构。

Conclusion: WPG在熵正则化RL中具备坚实的全局收敛保证，其收敛性源于Bellman结构所诱导的内在几何性质，而非传统凸性，为基于最优传输的策略优化方法提供了关键理论支持。

Abstract: Wasserstein policy gradient (WPG) is a policy optimization method for reinforcement learning (RL) that exploits the optimal-transport geometry of action distributions. For the entropy-regularized RL objective, WPG evolves each state-conditional policy by transporting it along the action gradient of the soft Q-function together with a Langevin-type diffusion. Despite its appeal for continuous-control problems, its global convergence properties remain poorly understood. Standard Langevin analyses do not directly apply, because the RL objective depends on the policy through the Bellman recursion rather than through a static convex functional, and the Langevin drift is determined by the soft Q-function, whose regularity must be controlled along the policy iterates.
  In this paper, we develop a global convergence theory for WPG by exploiting the Bellman structure of entropy-regularized RL. We show that the role usually played by convexity can be replaced by a Bellman-based argument: the soft Bellman residual admits a statewise KL representation with respect to a Gibbs policy; Bellman contraction relates this residual to the global optimality gap; and a Bellman resolvent identity connects value improvement to relative Fisher information. Combined with a uniform log-Sobolev inequality (LSI) for the evolving Gibbs family, these ingredients yield a distributional Polyak--Łojasiewicz condition. We further establish the regularity and uniform bounds needed to control the discretization error, thereby obtaining geometric contraction up to a discretization bias. Conceptually, our analysis shows that although entropy-regularized RL is not convex in the usual flat sense, the Bellman recursion induces a favorable Polyak--Lojasiewicz-type (PL) geometry that supports global convergence of WPG.

</details>


### [687] [OrpQuant: Geometric Orthogonal Residual Projection for Multiplier-Free Power-of-Two Transformer Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26092)
*Maoyang Xiang,Bo Wang,Tao Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Orthogonal Residual Projection (ORP)，一种算法-硬件协同设计框架，通过双基几何投影建模量化，在超低比特（如3-bit）下用纯移位加法替代乘累加，提升角度分辨率、保持高维特征流形质量，并大幅缩短校准时间（LLaMA-2-7B仅需15分钟），在精度与硬件时序上均优于现有方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PoT量化在超低比特（<4-bit）下存在'低角度分辨率'固有缺陷，导致高维特征流形严重退化，制约LLM/ViT在边缘设备的部署。

Method: 提出正交残差投影（ORP）框架：将量化建模为双基几何投影，利用严格移位-加法操作自适应构建高分辨率残差格点；设计解析求解器替代梯度优化，实现快速全模型校准。

Result: 在W3/A16下，LLaMA-2-7B困惑度达6.10，优于AWQ等MAC密集型方法且无需非对称缩放；RTL综合显示其在28nm工艺下显著缓解乘法器树时序瓶颈。

Conclusion: ORP通过算法-硬件协同突破了超低比特量化的几何瓶颈，在精度、速度和硬件效率间取得更好平衡，为边缘端大模型部署提供了可行路径。

Abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) on edge devices is significantly constrained by memory limitations and the critical timing bottlenecks introduced by dense Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) arrays. In the ultra-low bit regime, logarithmic Power-of-Two (PoT) quantization provides a hardware-efficient alternative by replacing MAC operations with bit-shifts. However, the non-uniform exponential lattice is inherently limited by a \textbf{Low Angular Resolution Regime}, a structural flaw that becomes particularly pronounced at sub-4-bit thresholds, leading to a notable degradation of high-dimensional feature manifolds.
  To address this geometric limitation, we propose Orthogonal Residual Projection (ORP), an algorithm-hardware co-design framework. By formulating quantization as a dual-basis geometric projection, ORP adaptively synthesizes a higher-resolution residual lattice using strictly shift-and-add operations. Furthermore, ORP's analytical solver offers a practical alternative to computationally intensive gradient-based optimization, reducing the full-model calibration time for LLaMA-2-7B to approximately \textbf{15 minutes}.
  Extensive evaluations demonstrate ORP's applicability across modalities and its hardware efficiency. Under the 3-bit (W3/A16) constraint, ORP achieves a perplexity of 6.10 on LLaMA-2-7B, comparing favorably to conventional MAC-intensive baselines like AWQ without relying on asymmetric scaling, while maintaining competitive accuracy in 4-bit scenarios. At the silicon level, standard-cell RTL synthesis at a 28nm node indicates that ORP effectively mitigates the timing bottlenecks associated with dense multiplier trees.

</details>


### [688] [Goal-driven Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design for Robust Decision-Making Under Model Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26093)
*Jinwoo Go,Xiaoning Qian,Byung-Jun Yoon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GoBOED，一种目标驱动的贝叶斯最优实验设计框架，直接针对下游决策目标优化实验设计，通过结合可摊销变分后验代理与可微凸决策层，实现完全以决策为中心的梯度优化，并在理论上和实验上验证其优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在关键决策场景中，单纯减少参数不确定性并不一定提升下游决策质量，因为只有与目标相关的特定参数方向才重要。

Method: 提出GoBOED框架，融合 amortized variational posterior surrogate 和可微凸决策层，支持端到端梯度优化；理论分析其梯度对无关参数方向不敏感。

Result: 在源定位、疫情管理、药代动力学控制等任务中，GoBOED找到更契合下游决策目标的实验设计，且近优设计窗口显著宽于传统BOED方法。

Conclusion: GoBOED通过目标驱动的设计优化，在保证决策质量的同时提高了实验设计的鲁棒性与实用性，为BOED在真实决策场景中的应用提供了新范式。

Abstract: Bayesian optimal experimental design (BOED) selects experiments to maximize information gain about model parameters. However, in decision-critical settings, reducing parameter uncertainty does not necessarily improve downstream decisions, as only specific parameter directions relevant to the objective truly matter. We propose GoBOED, a goal-driven BOED framework that directly optimizes experimental designs for a specified decision-making objective. GoBOED combines an amortized variational posterior surrogate with a differentiable convex decision layer, enabling gradient-based design optimization that is fully decision-focused. We theoretically show that GoBOED gradients are insensitive to parameter directions irrelevant to the decision objective, providing a formal justification for why goal-driven design achieves equivalent decision quality over a wider set of experimental designs than information-gain maximization. Empirically, across source localization, epidemic management, and pharmacokinetic control, GoBOED identifies designs that better align with downstream decision objectives and reveals that near-optimal design windows are substantially wider than those predicted by goal-agnostic BOED approaches.

</details>


### [689] [Forgetting in Language Models: Capacity, Optimization, and Self-Generated Replay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26097)
*Martin Marek,Dongkyu Cho,Shikai Qiu,Rumi Chunara,Pavel Izmailov,Andrew Gordon Wilson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用语言模型自身生成的样本来缓解持续学习中的遗忘问题，发现自生成样本可作为有效的回放数据，显著减少遗忘；但当模型预训练接近饱和时，容量限制仍会导致遗忘；回放机制可打破低学习率与高学习率之间的权衡，实现快速且无遗忘的微调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统持续学习中缓解遗忘需要存储和回放先前任务的样本，但实际中往往不可行；而语言模型能从自身训练分布中采样，这为无需外部存储的回放提供了新思路。

Method: 利用语言模型自生成先前任务的样本作为回放数据，在持续学习过程中混合使用真实新任务数据与自生成旧任务数据进行微调，并系统分析模型容量、学习率与遗忘的关系。

Result: 自生成样本作为回放数据几乎消除了遗忘；模型容量不足（预训练接近饱和）仍是遗忘主因；低学习率可减缓遗忘但需更多步数；引入回放后可在高学习率下快速微调且不遗忘。

Conclusion: 语言模型的自生成能力可替代传统回放，成为实用的持续学习方案；但模型容量是根本约束，回放机制能有效解耦学习速度与稳定性之间的矛盾。

Abstract: Models trained on a new task typically degrade on prior tasks, a phenomenon known as forgetting. Traditionally, mitigating forgetting has required replaying stored exemplars from prior tasks, which is often impractical. By contrast, language models can sample from their own training distribution, and we show that these self-generated samples serve as effective replay data, nearly eliminating forgetting. We find that forgetting nonetheless persists when the model has little remaining capacity: models pretrained close to saturation cannot absorb new information without overwriting prior knowledge. When capacity is not the limiting factor, low learning rates reduce forgetting but require substantially more training steps. Replay breaks this tradeoff, enabling fast, high-learning-rate finetuning without forgetting.

</details>


### [690] [Looped Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.26106)
*Sanghyun Lee,Chunsan Hong,Seungryong Kim,Jonghyun Lee,Jongho Park,Dongmin Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出LoopMDM，通过在训练时循环使用早期-中期Transformer层，提升掩码扩散语言模型的训练效率与性能，并支持推理时灵活计算缩放。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDMs）作为语言建模的新范式，其Transformer架构设计尚未被充分探索，尤其缺乏高效利用深度参数的方法。

Method: 提出LoopMDM方法：在训练阶段选择性地循环重复早期-中层Transformer块；推理时可动态调整循环次数以实现计算量缩放；并结合注意力机制分析验证其有效性。

Result: LoopMDM在多个预训练语料上达到同等性能的同时减少最多3.3倍训练FLOPs；在GSM8K等推理基准上最高提升8.5分；优于同计算量的更深非循环MDM；且支持自适应循环调度进一步提升推理效率。

Conclusion: 选择性层循环是一种简单而高效的架构增强策略，在不增加参数的前提下实现深度扩展与计算弹性，为MDMs提供了新的设计范式。

Abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models for language modeling, yet the effective design of transformer architectures for MDMs remains underexplored. In this paper, we show that selectively looping the early-middle transformer layers significantly improves both training efficiency and model performance in MDMs. We call this approach LoopMDM(Looped Masked Diffusion Model), which brings two key benefits: looping layers at training-time yields a depth-scaling effect without adding parameters, while varying the number of loops at inference-time enables flexible compute scaling. Despite the simplicity, the results are striking: across multiple pre-training corpora, LoopMDM matches the performance of same-size MDMs with up to 3.3 fewer training FLOPs, while its final performance outperforms them on various reasoning benchmarks, including up to 8.5 points on GSM8K. It even surpasses deeper non-looped MDMs trained with comparable per-step compute, indicating that selective looping is more effective than naive depth scaling. Furthermore, LoopMDM can scale inference-time compute by increasing the number of loops. Adaptively adjusting the number of loops throughout the sampling process further yields additional gains in compute efficiency while maintaining performance. Lastly, with attention analysis, we provide evidence that looping is effective in MDMs by promoting interactions among masked positions. Our code and weights will be publicly released.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [691] [RED: Adaptive Real-Time DAG Scheduling for Robotic Inference under Environmental Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24044)
*Zexin Li,Tao Ren,Johnathan Liu,Xiaoxi He,Cong Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RED实时调度框架，用于资源受限机器人平台上的多任务深度神经网络工作负载，通过子截止时间分配和MIMONet结构适配，在动态环境中保障端到端时序保证并提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人在动态环境中运行时，任务、依赖关系和工作负载结构会实时变化，导致多任务推理性能下降，尤其在资源和实时性受限条件下。

Method: 提出RED框架，包含截止时间感知的调度器（支持子截止时间分配）、MIMONet部署支持及基于共享参数特性的负载细化与计算图重构机制，并在Jetson和Apple M系列平台实现验证。

Result: 实验表明RED在吞吐量、截止时间满足率、抗干扰鲁棒性、适应性和运行开销等方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: RED有效应对机器人环境动态性，在保障实时性前提下提升了多任务DNN调度的效率与适应性，为动态场景下的边缘AI部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Robots deployed in dynamic environments must contend with environment-driven changes that reshape computation at runtime: new tasks may appear, precedence relations can shift, and overall workload structure evolves, all of which degrade performance, especially when multi-task inference is required under tight resource and real-time budgets. We present RED, a real-time scheduling framework for multi-task deep neural network workloads on resource-constrained robotic platforms that adapts to Robotic Environmental Dynamics (RED) while preserving end-to-end timing guarantees under modeling assumptions. The core of RED is a deadline-aware scheduler that assigns intermediate sub-deadlines, allowing it to accommodate evolving computation graphs and asynchronous inference induced by unpredictable conditions. The framework also supports flexible deployment of MIMONet (multi-input multi-output neural networks), commonly used in multi-tasking robots to alleviate memory pressure through weight sharing. RED explicitly leverages this shared-parameter property via a workload refinement and graph-reconstruction procedure that aligns MIMONet structure with schedulability requirements, improving compatibility and efficiency. We implement RED on NVIDIA Jetson family platforms and on an Apple M-series MacBook and evaluate it on navigation-oriented workloads representative of real robotic scenarios. Experiments show consistent gains over existing methods in throughput, deadline satisfaction, robustness to interference, adaptability, and runtime overhead.

</details>


### [692] [MASt3R-Nav: WayPixel Navigation in Relative 3D Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24111)
*Vansh Garg,Rohit Jayanti,Krish Pandya,Sarthak Chittawar,Siddharth Tourani,Muhammad Haris Khan,Sourav Garg,Madhava Krishna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于像素级相对几何关系的新型地图表示方法——'WayPixel Costmap'，用于提升视觉导航能力，相比图像级或物体级表示更准确，显著提升了导航性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统3D地图依赖全局几何一致性，而拓扑图虽简化却仅支持‘教学-重复’式导航；需一种兼顾几何准确性与局部建模灵活性的新表示。

Method: 基于图像序列，利用图像对间的像素对应关系构建相对3D坐标系下的像素级连通图；通过近似和稀疏化图内像素连接，生成WayPixel Costmap，并训练条件于此costmap的控制器预测轨迹。

Result: 在仿真环境四类导航任务及真实世界演示中验证了该方法的有效性；WayPixel Costmap作为控制预测的条件变量，性能优于图像级和物体级表示。

Conclusion: 像素级相对几何地图（WayPixel Costmap）是一种更精确、实用的视觉导航表征，可在不依赖全局一致几何的前提下实现强泛化导航能力。

Abstract: Visual navigation ability is strongly tied to its underlying representation of the world. Unlike classical 3D maps that require globally-consistent geometry, image- or object-relative topological graphs almost entirely do away with geometric understanding. But, this comes at the cost of navigation capability, often limiting it to merely teach-and-repeat. In this work, we propose a novel map representation in the form of pixel-relative connectivity, which is geometrically accurate but does not require global geometric consistency. Inspired by recent progress in 3D grounded image matching, we construct a map from an image sequence through inter-image connectivity based on pixel correspondences in the relative 3D coordinate systems of individual image pairs. We then use this pixel-level graph to perform global path planning by approximating and sparsifying intra-image pixel connectivity. Through this, we derive a ''WayPixel Costmap'' representation and train a controller conditioned on it to predict a trajectory rollout. We show that this dense pixel-level costmap based on relative geometry is a more accurate conditioning variable for control prediction than its image- and object-level counterparts. This enables a highly capable navigation system, as validated on four types of navigation tasks in the simulator and through real world demonstrations.

</details>


### [693] [Anisotropic Diffusion-Driven Ergodic Coverage in Multi-Robot Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24125)
*Thales C. Silva,Anoop Kiran,Nora Ayanian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种各向异性扩散的遍历性搜索新方法，通过Perona-Malik扩散方程生成势场，使多机器人系统能更灵活、定向地跟踪目标分布，统一并推广了以往基于热方程和径向基函数的遍历搜索方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统遍历搜索在多机器人系统中使用各尺度下的遍历性度量，但近期基于热方程的方法存在各向同性扩散导致误差均匀传播、无法适应目标分布局部变化的问题。

Method: 提出一类广义各向异性扩散形式的遍历性建模方法，以Perona-Malik扩散方程求解结果的梯度驱动机器人运动，并将热方程作为其特例；该势场融合了目标分布与轨迹覆盖差异的表征。

Result: 仿真验证了该方法在多种场景下优于传统各向同性方法，能更准确、自适应地匹配非均匀目标分布，且统一了径向基函数与热方程两类既有建模方式。

Conclusion: 各向异性扩散（特别是Perona-Malik型）为遍历搜索提供了更具表达力和方向性的势场生成机制，提升了多机器人对复杂空间分布的搜索效率与精度。

Abstract: We consider the problem of combining potential field and ergodic search on multi-robot systems. Traditional ergodic search algorithms use metrics for ergodicity that account for the desired distribution at different scales. Recently, a heat equation-driven ergodic approach was proposed, which adds flexibility to the smoothing of the ergodic metric. However, such an approach, as it is an isotropic diffusion, propagates the error uniformly in all directions, regardless of changes in the desired distribution. We introduce a general class of anisotropic diffusion formulation of the ergodicity problem, which generates a potential field for the ergodic search. We demonstrate that this approach generalizes previous results, which consider radial basis functions and the solution of the heat equation to represent the difference between the goal density distribution and the covered trajectories. In our solution, the agent movement is directed using the gradient of the solution of the Perona-Malik diffusion, and our formulation includes the heat equation as a special case. We demonstrate the methodology with a series of simulations in different scenarios.

</details>


### [694] [Investigating the Effect of a Series Elastic Actuation Retrofit to Black-Box Actuators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24127)
*Ivan Tregear,Ayhan Aktas,Ferdinando Rodriguez y Baena*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种低成本、高带宽的串联弹性执行器（SEA）改装方案，通过定制扭转SE元件显著提升了力控带宽（2.93倍）并实现了高精度力测量，性能优于商用传感器且成本极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统刚性执行器在不确定环境中缺乏顺应性，易造成损伤且力控制性能差；而现有SEA虽能提升顺应性和力测量能力，但常受限于系统带宽降低。

Method: 设计并加工一个基于有限元分析的扭转SE元件（刚度2155.4 Nm/rad），将其 retrofit 到黑箱电机上以抑制非线性（如回差、静摩擦）；分别测试开环与闭环力控带宽，并与商用力传感器对比性能与成本。

Result: SEA改装使开环力控带宽从10.32 Hz提升至30.32 Hz（提升2.93倍）；闭环下力测量精度比商用传感器高7.63%，成本仅25英镑。

Conclusion: 低成本定制SE元件可有效提升力控性能与带宽，同时实现高保真力测量，在机器人交互与力反馈任务中具有实用价值。

Abstract: In robotic applications, actuators are typically designed to be stiff with minimal backlash to ensure precision and repeatability. However, this limits compliance, leading to potential damage and poor force control in uncertain environments. Series Elastic Actuation (SEA) introduces compliance to enhance disturbance rejection and enable force measurement via Hooke's Law but reduces system bandwidth.
  A custom Series Elastic (SE) element was retrofitted to a black-box actuator to mitigate non-linearities like backlash and static friction. Integrating the SE element enabled high-fidelity force measurements, improving force control bandwidth and performance.
  A torsional SE element was designed through Finite Element (FE) analysis, yielding a stiffness of 2155.4 Nm/rad. Open-loop force control bandwidth was measured for the original motor and the SEA-integrated configuration, while closed-loop bandwidth was assessed using feedback from the SEA and a commercial force sensor. The SEA module increased bandwidth from 10.32 Hz to 30.32 Hz, a 2.93X improvement. Additionally, it outperformed the commercial sensor by 7.63% despite costing 25 GBP, a fraction of the price.

</details>


### [695] [Afford-VLA: Action-Aligned Visual Planning via Internalized Affordance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24203)
*Runze Wang,Yuqian Fu,Yu Li,Tao Lin,Tianwen Qian,Mohamed Elhoseiny,Bo Zhao,Yanwei Fu,Yu-Gang Jiang,Xiangyang Xue*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Afford-VLA框架，通过在视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中内化任务条件下的可操作性（affordance）作为显式的视觉规划接口，提升机器人在复杂场景中的空间推理与动作决策能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在复杂视觉场景中空间推理能力不足，尤其难以确定交互位置；已有视觉规划方法依赖全局几何线索、符号化中间表示或外部视觉信号，与动作预测耦合弱。

Method: 提出Afford-VLA：引入可学习的<AFF> token查询任务相关交互区域，从多模态特征解码可操作性掩码，并将其转化为紧凑嵌入以直接调节动作生成；采用联合优化策略同步训练可操作性路径与动作预测。

Result: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和SimplerEnv等多个仿真基准及真实世界实验中达到一致的SOTA性能。

Conclusion: 将可操作性内化为与动作对齐的视觉规划机制，是提升VLA系统性能的有效范式。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong potential for generalist robot manipulation, yet they remain limited by insufficient spatial reasoning, particularly in determining where to interact in complex visual scenes. While recent efforts introduce various forms of visual planning to address this issue, existing approaches either rely on global geometric cues, symbolic intermediate representations, or externally generated visual signals, which are often weakly coupled with downstream action prediction. In this work, we revisit visual planning in VLA systems and argue that effective planning should be local, visually grounded, internally generated, and directly aligned with action. Based on this insight, we propose Afford-VLA, a unified framework that internalizes task-conditioned affordance as an explicit visual planning interface within VLA models. Concretely, we introduce learnable <AFF> tokens to query task-relevant interaction regions, decode affordance masks from multimodal features, and convert them into compact embeddings that directly condition action generation. This design enables affordance to be both generated and utilized within the VLA, forming a tightly coupled perception-action pathway. To further support this integration, we adopt a training strategy that allows the affordance pathway to be jointly optimized with action prediction, improving its effectiveness for downstream control. We evaluate our method on multiple simulation benchmarks, including LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and SimplerEnv, achieving consistent state-of-the-art performance, along with strong real-world results. These findings demonstrate that internalizing affordance as action-aligned visual planning provides a powerful paradigm for improving VLA systems.

</details>


### [696] [ECo-MoE: Embodiment-Conditioned Mixture of Experts Increases the Evolvability of Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24225)
*Yibin Wang,Muhan Li,Zihan Guo,Sam Kriegman*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种机器人进化与学习的联合优化模型，通过协同优化潜在设计向量分布（基因型）和由表型激活的控制专家混合体（神经模块），实现高效、模块化、可扩展的具身智能体演化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现有协同设计算法的两大缺陷：为每个机器人单独训练策略效率低，而为所有机器人训练统一控制器又导致结构与行为过于保守。

Method: 构建一个联合优化框架，其中潜在设计向量（genotype）分布与由对应解码表型动态门控的控制专家（神经模块）混合体共同演化；支持预训练专家模块即插即用，实现‘evo by demo’引导式演化。

Result: 实现了模块化、可复用、可扩展的机器人形态-控制协同演化；验证了预训练专家可有效引导自由演化朝向目标形态结构；提供了开源代码与演示视频。

Conclusion: 该方法在个体专用性与通用性之间取得平衡，既保留祖先知识，又支持按需更新特定模块，并能利用示范知识定向探索形态空间，为具身智能演化提供了新范式。

Abstract: In this paper, we introduce a model of evolution and learning in robots that co-optimizes a distribution of latent design vectors (genotypes) and a mixture of control experts (neural modules), which are gated by the latent coordinates of each decoded design (phenotype). This provides a scalable alternative to co-design algorithms that either train an individual policy for every robot, which is inefficient, or a monolithic universal controller for all robots, which results in overly conservative structures and behaviors. Our approach lies somewhere between these two extremes, preserving ancestral knowledge in a unified yet modular framework in which different body plans activate and deactivate different combinations of learned sensorimotor circuits for goal-directed behavior. This allows one part of the controller to be overhauled to better suit new species of designs as they emerge without disrupting the hard-earned knowledge contained within other expert modules. It also allows pretrained expert policies to be directly plugged into the mixture, which can steer evolution into otherwise unexplored areas of latent space containing desired morphological traits. We refer to this process as "evo by demo" and explore how it may be used to guide freeform evolution toward canonical structures defined by the pretrained model. Videos and code can be found at: https://eco-moe.github.io.

</details>


### [697] [AcroRL: Learning Aggressive Quadrotor Inversion using Bidirectional Thrust](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24301)
*Gabriel Rodriguez,Henri Sayag,Abhishek Rathod,John Stecklein,Siddharth Saha,Christopher Barngrover,Wennie Tabib*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于学习的框架，用于实现四旋翼无人机在位置约束下的紧凑翻转（正飞↔倒飞），通过强化学习训练独立策略来调制固定参考轨迹，在仿真和硬件实验中均显著提升了精度与响应速度，并开源了代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于几何控制的方法在处理双向推力时存在执行器饱和和电机反转延迟问题，需依赖启发式调度和调参，难以可靠实现翻转等激进机动。

Method: 提出一种学习型框架，通过JAX仿真环境中的强化学习分别训练正飞到倒飞、倒飞到正飞的两个独立策略，调制恒定参考轨迹以满足位置约束，并保持与传统轨迹生成与跟踪方法的兼容性。

Result: 仿真中位置RMSE降低32%，稳定时间缩短57%；硬件实验在多种偏航姿态下成功翻转，位置RMSE<0.35m，并验证了与圆形轨迹跟踪等下游任务的兼容性。

Conclusion: 该学习框架在保证兼容性的同时显著提升了双向推力四旋翼翻转的精度、鲁棒性与实时性，为激进机动提供了新范式。

Abstract: Bidirectional thrust grants quadrotors a second equilibrium condition and increased control authority, expanding the envelope of possible aggressive maneuvers and enabling inverted flight, perching, and sensing. Prior geometric control approaches extend differential flatness through Hopf fibration-based attitude representations to support bidirectional thrust, but struggle with actuator saturation and motor reversal delay during inversions, requiring heuristic thrust posture scheduling and waypoint tuning. We propose a learning-based framework that modulates a constant reference trajectory to perform compact, position-constrained quadrotor inversions while remaining compatible with traditional trajectory generation and tracking across flight regimes. Separate policies are trained via reinforcement learning for nominal-to-inverted and inverted-to-nominal transitions. In JAX-based simulation, the proposed method achieves the lowest position deviation and settling time across all evaluated baselines, reducing position root mean square error (RMSE) by 32% and settling time by 57% relative to the strongest optimization-based baseline. Hardware experiments demonstrate successful inversion across multiple yaw configurations with position RMSE below 0.35m, and compatibility with downstream trajectory generation and control through circular flight in both regimes. Additionally, we provide an open-source implementation of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [698] [Terrain-Adaptive Grouser Wheel for Optimal Planetary Exploration: Design and Experimental Investigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24311)
*Vincent Griffo,Yashwanth Kumar Nakka*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可连续调节履齿高度的多模态车轮（[Anonymized Robot Name]），在多种颗粒地形上显著降低打滑、提升行驶效率与能耗表现，并通过实验验证了履齿高度需随地形颗粒度动态调整，表明固定式车轮难以适应多样化地外环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 行星探测车在复杂外星地形（如坡度、颗粒度变化）中常面临严重移动困难；现有变刚度、变直径等多模态轮设计未充分探索履齿高度主动调节这一关键自由度，而颗粒地形中更高履齿可显著提升性能。

Method: 设计并实现一种可连续调节履齿高度的多模态车轮平台[Anonymized Robot Name]，在四种典型表面（乙烯基地板、粗岩、豌豆砾石、两种密实度的沙地）开展750次实验；基于数据建立并验证简化标度分析模型，关联地形颗粒度与最优履齿高度。

Result: 相比固定履齿配置，在颗粒地形中自适应调节使打滑率降低30.0–58.0%，通行时间与能耗最多改善77.4%；标度分析揭示了地形颗粒度与最优履齿高度之间的关系；无单一履齿高度能在所有地形下最小化打滑。

Conclusion: 履齿高度自适应形态（如[Anonymized Robot Name]）能有效增强探测车在多样且高挑战性外星环境中的越障与移动能力，突破传统固定轮构型的适应性瓶颈。

Abstract: Planetary rovers operating in extraterrestrial environments often encounter significant mobility challenges due to varying terrain features such as gradients and granularity. While recent works in multimodal wheel design have explored adjustments in stiffness, compliance, and diameter as a means to improve terrain adaptability, full wheel grouser-adjustable designs remain largely unexplored. Grousers are a compelling feature to actuate, as granular terrains tend to require increased grouser height for improved wheel performance. As a result, we introduce [Anonymized Robot Name], a multimodal wheel capable of continuously adjusting its grouser height for terrain adaptation. The platform was evaluated across four representative surfaces, including vinyl flooring, coarse rock, pea gravel, and sand under two packing states, spanning a range of granular conditions. Results from 750 experimental trials demonstrate that adaptive deployment reduces slip by 30.0--58.0\% and improves travel time and energy consumption by up to 77.4\% in granular regimes relative to fixed configurations. Using the terrain trial data, a simplified scaling analysis was developed and validated, suggesting a relationship between terrain granularity and optimal grouser height for the tested configuration. No single grouser height minimized slip across all terrains, underscoring the limitations of fixed-wheel systems commonly used for planetary exploration. This observation reinforces the potential of grouser-adaptive morphology, such as [Anonymized Robot Name], as an effective solution for enhancing rover mobility across diverse and mobility-challenging extraterrestrial environments.

</details>


### [699] [IsaacIPC: Coupling High-Fidelity Simulation and Realistic Rendering for Contact-Rich Robotic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.24339)
*Qixin Liang,Zhongqing Han*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: IsaacIPC is a robotic simulation framework that integrates GPU-accelerated incremental potential contact (IPC) with IsaacSim/Lab to enable real-time, realistic rendering and improved tactile sensing via a novel geometric mortar contact potential (GMCP).


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To enable real-time realistic rendering and accurate tactile sensing in robotic simulations involving rigid-deformable interactions.
